name: Bill Hagerty
subject: ICYMI: The American Conservative Union Endorses Bill Hagerty
body:
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw [this](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-r/) tweet by the American Conservative Union (ACU), joining true conservatives like [President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-y/),[ Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-j/),[ Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-t/) and[ Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-i/) in endorsing my campaign for U.S. Senate. [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-d/) I am honored to have the endorsement of the ACU. They are on the frontlines protecting our conservative values and equipping conservatives with the skills needed to become more effective activists. In the U.S. Senate, I will be a strong conservative ally to President Donald Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to help protect our conservative values.I appreciate your continued support as we head into Election Day on Thursday. Best, Bill | [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-b/)| [](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-l-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-n/)
---|---|---|---
Team Hagerty
4515 Harding Pike
Suite 110
Nashville, TN 37205
[Preferences](https://hfs.updatemyprofile.com/t-phtkkht-76178D70-fuutjhhtj-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://hfs.cmail19.com/t/t-u-phtkkht-fuutjhhtj-x/)

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: re: Loeffler's interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
Racism has no home in Georgia.
| | |
---
Friend, I need to make sure you see this news:
**After weeks of shamefully attacking the Black Lives Matter movement, Kelly Loeffler just sat for an interview with a TV pundit known for his ties to white supremacists and neo-Nazis. And when she received backlash for doing so, she _doubled down_ in defending him.

Let's be clear: Loeffler's dog-whistle politics are nothing more than an effort to sow division, keep this seat red and protect Mitch McConnell's extremist majority.**
There's something important happening in Georgia and across the country. But my right-wing Republican opponent is more concerned with her political future than the future of the next generation. Whether our people-powered movement is able to defeat her could decide which party controls the Senate, and with polls showing this race statistically tied, McConnell and the GOP have never been more vulnerable. But I need your help:
While Loeffler is cozying up to white supremacists, she's also spending $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat - and unless we raise another $14,292 by midnight tonight, we won't have the resources we need to fight back, win this race and take back the Senate for Democrats.
**Here's the thing: If everyone reading this email chipped in even just a few dollars right now, we'd hit our goal in minutes. But I know not everyone will, so I'm personally asking if I can count on you, friend: [Please, can you give $5 or more now to help us flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2e7/288179be/95fe3ca/348e1637/3092120905/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrNDg4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk488-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks, friend - your support will send GOP politicians like Loeffler a clear message that we're going forward in our fight for justice, not back.
Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2e7/288179be/95fe3ca/348e1630/3092120905/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia.

name: Team Joe
subject: a peek at what's happening in August for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
First: Joe Biden will name his running mate! |
---
Peter, if you thought July was a jam-packed month for the campaign, here's a peek at just some of what's happening in August:

**First:** Joe Biden will name his running mate!

**Then:** We'll hold the four day, Democratic National Convention, where we'll celebrate the strength and unity of our party -- and formally nominate the ticket that will beat Donald Trump in November.

**And after the convention:** We enter the phase of the campaign where a significant number of undecided voters really start tuning in and making up their minds about who they'll vote for.

Which is why we need to have our staff ready to engage, ads on the airwaves, and important information distributed so we are ready for these voters as they start deciding.

**We 're relying on grassroots donations to make sure we have the resources we need to implement all of the critical programming we have planned for this month. Donations from grassroots supporters like you make up 97% of our campaign's contributions, and we need a surge of support today from first-time donors to make sure August is a huge success.**

If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba6f/1cd0ac28/17c8cfcde/357d73f2/1824522129/VEsEBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba6f/1cd0ac28/17c8cfcde/357d73ed/1824522129/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: WATCH: Here’s what I really think about this pandemic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhjuyuy-ojdkijhkdh-y/) Friend,

I’ve had about enough of this guy Fauci.

Instead of having a plan to protect the most vulnerable among us and allowing us to get to herd immunity, he called for total lockdown. His plan did incredible damage to our economy. Fauci failed, and now he wants us to double down on failure again by completely destroying what’s left of our economy.

**If I’m President Trump, I call Dr. Fauci into the Board room and tell him, “You’re fired.”** [AGREE? DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhjuyuy-ojdkijhkdh-j/) But he’s not the only one who has been trigger-happy about locking people down. **Where do Facebook and Twitter get off freezing the accounts of doctors who advocate the use of hydroxychloroquine as a treatment option for patients?**

Hydroxychloroquine is a legitimate treatment option for doctors to use with patients. It’s not a silver bullet, but at the same time, I had a friend whose life was saved because of hydroxychloroquine. Remind me again, where did Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey get their MDs? They need to butt out of this conversation and let doctors work. **Friend, as a doctor, I’ve got a lot to say about the COVID-19 epidemic and the government’s response to it.** I haven’t been shy about sharing my opinions. But after the proposal of this latest lockdown, I am fired up. And I let loose at our most recent rally with Rand Paul: [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhjuyuy-ojdkijhkdh-t/) [WATCH DR. MANNY TELL IT LIKE IT IS](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkhjuyuy-ojdkijhkdh-i/) Appreciate your support. Together, we’ll restore common sense to Washington.

Thank you,
Dr. Manny Sethi Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

body:
[1]Powered By People

If you want evidence of our growing coalition in Texas, look no further
than President Obama's first wave of 2020 endorsements: yesterday, he
endorsed 27 Texas Democrats for positions in the State House and U.S.
Congress, the most of any other state on his slate.

This is proof that our work in Texas has never been more critical. The
things we are working so hard towards — winning a Democratic majority in
the State House and denying Trump Texas's 38 Electoral College votes — are
well within reach.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42890?refcode=ema20200804-100138&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=100138%2E444211%2EqD_sUK ]Will you chip in $3 to support these efforts and keep
our dialer and technology systems running?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42890?refcode=ema20200804-100138&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=100138%2E444211%2EqD_sUK ]Contribute $3

Now that there's less than three months to go until Election Day, our work
in reaching out to voters is ramping up. In order to keep pace, we need to
grow our phone banks, recruit more volunteers, and make sure our staff and
callers have all the support they need.

Right now, hundreds of volunteers are putting in the work and reaching out
to thousands of voters week after week — all in the service of turning
Texas blue and getting Trump out of office, finally and forever.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42890?refcode=ema20200804-100138&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1041&akid=100138%2E444211%2EqD_sUK ]Our work is critical — and we're counting on you to help support it.
Will you chip in $3 right now to fuel our voter contact
and turnout efforts across Texas?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42890?refcode=ema20200804-100138&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1042&akid=100138%2E444211%2EqD_sUK ]Contribute $3

— The Powered By People team

name: Team Hagerty
subject: Election Day Is Almost Here!
body:
#TeamHagerty Updates Straight To Your Inbox
No images? [Click here](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-e-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-ti/) August 4, 2020 **President Trump Is All In On #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-r/) President Donald J. Trump reminded Tennessee voters of the importance of sending Bill Hagerty to the United States Senate last week. This is the third time that President Trump has tweeted his support of Bill's campaign for Senate and we couldn't be more proud to have him on Team Hagerty. With endorsements from strong conservative leaders like the President, Vice President Mike Pence, Senator Marsha Blackburn, Congressman Chuck Fleischmann and Fox News host Sean Hannity, Team Hagerty has never been stronger. **Election Day Is Almost Here** Election Day for the Tennessee Republican Senate Primary is almost underway. #TeamHagerty is proud to have the support of Tennesseans, including over 1,000 local leaders in communities across the state. Make sure you get out to the polls and cast your ballot this **THURSDAY** to send Bill to the U.S. Senate. You can find your polling location **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-y/)** **We Are #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-j/) In his latest tweet supporting Bill's campaign, President Trump said that Team Hagerty is running an excellent campaign. We couldn't agree more, and it's because of all of the hard work and support of each of you. Over the past year, we have had some incredible moments on the trail, connecting with Tennesseans across the state. You can see some of these moments by watching the video highlighting our strong grassroots support [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-t/) **WATCH: Sen. Blackburn Is #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-i/) Senator Marsha Blackburn recently announced her endorsement of Bill Hagerty for the United States Senate. We couldn't be more grateful to have the support of the most conservative member of the Senate. Sen. Blackburn is a proven fighter for Tennesseans. When Bill gets to the Senate, he will continue working alongside Sen. Blackburn and President Trump to protect our conservative values. You can read the press release announcing Sen. Blackburn's endorsement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-d/)** **Diamond & Silk Are #TeamHagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-h/) Last week, at the Hamilton County Lincoln Day Dinner, conservative leaders, Diamond and Silk, endorsed Bill Hagerty for the U.S. Senate. While speaking about their support for Bill, **Diamond said,** "We need to make sure that we put people in these seats that are behind the President of the United States. Bill is one of them!"You can watch the video of their endorsement **[HERE.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-k/)** **READ: Andy Holt Supports Bill Hagerty** [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-u/) Representative Andy Holt is a strong member of Team Hagerty and we are honored to have his support. In his latest editorial, **Rep. Holt writes,** "I've known Bill for over almost a decade, and he has also earned my endorsement. Bill Hagerty is a Christian, a fine husband and father, a dedicated public servant, and a freedom-loving patriot. In the Senate, he will work tirelessly to defend our conservative values from those trying to undermine them."Read the full editorial [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-o/)
## **Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty**
[TELL US WHY YOU SUPPORT BILL HAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-m/) [DONATE TO THE CAMPAIGN](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-c/) [VOLUNTEER WITH #TEAMHAGERTY](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-q/)
## **Press Highlights**
**[Williamson HomePage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-a/) **Sean Hannity throws support behind Bill Hagerty**[99.7:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-f/) **Donald Trump Tweets Support For Bill Hagerty **[WRCB:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-z/) **Bill Hagerty At The Hamilton County Lincoln Dinner**[Hugh Hewitt Show:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-v/) **Bill Hagerty Discusses China's Threat**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-e/) **Donald Trump Jr. Names Bill Hagerty His MAGA Candidate of the Week**[Williamson Homepage:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-s/) **Blackburn says Hagerty will help her 'hold China accountable for what they have done to our nation'**[TN Star:](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-g/) **Mike Pence Endorses Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate
## **What They're Saying...**
> _"__Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!"_
> [-President Donald Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-w/) _" TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" _
> [-Vice President Mike Pence](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-yd/) _" I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." _
> [-Senator Marsha Blackburn](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-yh/) _" Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." _
> [-Fox News' Sean Hannity](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-yk/) _" Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families."_
> [-Lara Trump](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-yu/) _" Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man."_
> [-Donald Trump Jr.](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jl/)_" Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative."_
> [-Kellyanne Conway](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jr/) _" Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground."_
> [-Sen. Tom Cotton](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jy/) _" Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!"_
> [-KT McFarland](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jj/) _" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud."_
> [-Marilyn Musgrave](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jt/) _" We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Larry Kudlow](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-ji/) _" I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty."_
> [-Nikki Haley](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jd/) _" Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County."_
> [-Eddie Farris, Sheriff](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jh/) _" You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_
> [-Mayor Robby Hatcher](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-jk/)
| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-tl/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-tr/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-ty/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-tj/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phtiilk-fuutjhhtj-tt/)
---|---|---|---|---

You can find your polling location We Are #TeamHagerty In his latest tweet supporting Bill's campaign, President Trump said that Team Hagerty is running an excellent campaign. We couldn't agree more, and it's because of all of the hard work and support of each of you. Over the past year, we have had some incredible moments on the trail, connecting with Tennesseans across the state. You can see some of these moments by watching the video highlighting our strong grassroots support WATCH: Sen. Blackburn Is #TeamHagerty Senator Marsha Blackburn recently announced her endorsement of Bill Hagerty for the United States Senate. We couldn't be more grateful to have the support of the most conservative member of the Senate. Sen. Blackburn is a proven fighter for Tennesseans. When Bill gets to the Senate, he will continue working alongside Sen. Blackburn and President Trump to protect our conservative values. You can read the press release announcing Sen. Blackburn's endorsement Diamond & Silk Are #TeamHagerty Last week, at the Hamilton County Lincoln Day Dinner, conservative leaders, Diamond and Silk, endorsed Bill Hagerty for the U.S. Senate. While speaking about their support for Bill, Diamond said, "We need to make sure that we put people in these seats that are behind the President of the United States. Bill is one of them!"You can watch the video of their endorsement READ: Andy Holt Supports Bill Hagerty Representative Andy Holt is a strong member of Team Hagerty and we are honored to have his support. In his latest editorial, Rep. Holt writes, "I've known Bill for over almost a decade, and he has also earned my endorsement. Bill Hagerty is a Christian, a fine husband and father, a dedicated public servant, and a freedom-loving patriot. In the Senate, he will work tirelessly to defend our conservative values from those trying to undermine them."Read the full editorial Be A Part Of #TeamHagerty Press Highlights Sean Hannity throws support behind Bill Hagerty Donald Trump Tweets Support For Bill Hagerty Bill Hagerty At The Hamilton County Lincoln Dinner Bill Hagerty Discusses China's Threat Donald Trump Jr. Names Bill Hagerty His MAGA Candidate of the Week Blackburn says Hagerty will help her 'hold China accountable for what they have done to our nation' Mike Pence Endorses Bill Hagerty for U.S. Senate What They're Saying... "Tennessee loving Bill Hagerty, who was my Tennessee Victory Chair and is now the very outstanding Ambassador to Japan, will be running for the U.S. Senate. He is strong on crime, borders & our 2nd A. Loves our Military & our Vets. Has my Complete & Total Endorsement!" " TN's Bill Hagerty is my friend & has been a champion for President Donald Trump's AMERICA FIRST agenda from Day One. Bill will fight for Conservative values, stand up for Life, Protect 2A Rights & create American jobs. TN & America need Bill Hagerty in the Senate!" " I fully support Bill Hagerty for the #TNSen, because I need a true Tennessee conservative to stand with me to protect our shared values. Bill is a true conservative, & he will always fight for you. Send him to the Senate to work with me & President Donald Trump." " Tennessee - send Bill Hagerty to the Senate. He supported President Donald Trump in 2016 & has worked closely with him since. Bill is the ONLY Trump conservative in the #TNSen race. He has my total support." " Bill was really a member of Team Trump before it was politically advantageous - before anybody else said let's jump on board, and he's been ready to work with President Trump since day one and he wants to do the same for Tennessee families." " Bill was on the Trump train before it was politically expedient. My father trusts him, he believes in him. For my father to have endorsed Bill Hagerty early in a primary, tells you all you need to know about the man." " Ideologically, Bill is an unapologetic and a very proud conservative, and what I mean by that is he's for free markets, he is for freedom, not free stuff, and he respects the dignity and the liberty of each individual, and I know that's what makes him a conservative." " Bill has been a good friend, he was a great ambassador to the US in Tokyo and he is going to be a fantastic senator. If there is one word I would use to describe Bill it's fearless. Bill helped solidify and strengthen our relationship with Japan which is absolutely essential to us standing up to China. Believe me, I can tell you that Beijing noticed the minute Bill got on the ground." " Bill Hagerty is TERRIFIC! Can't wait to call him Senator Hagerty come November!" " We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. Bill has served his country and President Trump with distinction, and we're thrilled to see him bring his leadership to the United States Senate where he will continue to make Tennesseans proud." " We need leaders like that on the floor of the U.S. Senate because frankly, the next couple of years are going to be about the Great American Come Back. The Great American Revival. That's why we need Bill Hagerty." " I know that Bill Hagerty is a good quality Republican. He knows the value of conservative judges and is going to fight to support President Donald Trump. The President and I will continue to come back and support Bill Hagerty." " Let me take a moment to say what a blessing it is to have someone like Bill Hagerty. He is not only my friend but he's done a great job...as the Ambassador to Japan. But not only that, he is a huge supporter of law enforcement. I can't tell you how much he's helped me personally and...in Putnam County." " You may have questions about who to vote for and who to get out and elect this campaign season, and I want you to know where I stand. I stand with Bill Hagerty because of the fine values he has and he supports our President Donald J Trump. I ask for you to get out there and support Bill Hagerty and his campaign."_ | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty P.O. Box 150748 Nashville, TN 37215 |

subject: VIDEO: Michael W Smith endorses Dr. Manny!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
This video is a must-watch.

---|---|---
| [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-y/) Friend,

One of the most common questions we’ve gotten on the campaign trail: **What is the most important thing in Manny Sethi’s life?**

**The answer is simple: his faith in Christ.**

His steady commitment to his faith led Michael W. Smith to speak out and endorse Dr. Manny in a video this weekend: [](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-j/) [WATCH HIS ENDORSEMENT HERE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-t/) Here’s just a taste of what he said: _“As a believer, I know the importance of having faithful leaders representing us. Dr. Manny came to Christ as a young man, and he has been serving the Lord as a trauma surgeon ever since. He will be a strong Christian leader in the Senate."_ [WATCH THE FULL VIDEO HERE](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-i/) The election is THIS THURSDAY. Time is of the essence. That’s why we’re asking you to do two things today:
1. **Share this video** with your friends and family who haven’t decided who they are voting for yet. Tell them what kind of man Dr. Manny is. Help us win their vote.
2. **Donate** to help our campaign push ahead in these last few hours. Our polls are still showing a dead heat leading into election day. **[Every dollar counts right now!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-d/)**

[DONATE NOW](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jkhtxz-ojdkijhkdh-h/) Appreciate your support. Together, we’ll restore common sense to Washington.

Thank you,
Dr. Manny Sethi Copyright © 2020 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.

We just launched our BRAND-NEW 2020 Make America Great Again Hats, and I told my team that I wanted to HAND-SIGN one of them to give to one of my BEST supporters. It should come as no surprise that YOU immediately came to mind as that supporter. You’ve been there for me since the very beginning, which is why I wanted to give you PRIORITY-ACCESS to enter to win this ICONIC hat before anyone else. All you have to do is contribute ANY AMOUNT and you’ll automatically be entered to win this beautiful 2020 Make America Great Again Hat that I HAND-SIGNED just for YOU. I am only offering PRIORITY-ACCESS to a few of my best supporters. Do not share this information with anyone. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to win this new 2020 Make America Great Again Hat that was hand-signed by yours truly. >> CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT You deserve to win this hat. My team is giving me the first round of entries soon. Will I see your name on there? Please contribute ANY AMOUNT by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to win a HAND-SIGNED 2020 Make America Great Again Hat. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here or by texting “2020MAGAHAT"; to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between July 9, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 9, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive one signed Official Make America Great Again Hat (approximate retail value $30). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. body:
Take a look at the lessons of the scandal during the Obama-Biden administration as the 2020 Presidential Election approaches.
| [ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWl_nJ4pWJzMW8xR7ft9hdNnCW93kvSZ4dnhQ6N7PgQ1Q3lGmQV1-WJV7CgRV4W5f3M_92llQX5W8F55WZ1D1GfZV28h8r3HcgnLW98-P207ndJYQN2mc-DKpgjR0W6c6kkf944jH2W34nQX25cg31tW4cL_5N2XCn3NW2wxxZS7cNcy0W2q3LMw4wMY10W5v3VQ_5N745FN1rC_9p8DKbvW6QHBgy2dgwvYW1D27_h35yTTQW1rhz6R7KxvM8W1StGpC1szcvtVtxF7B4Fxy0KW1K8TFX203gKrW60Znkf3gHbk5W5hHctz1DV033W2XMYZT55Kp8rW4XFGyZ862TB631Q31)

Hey Peter, Joe Biden wants to be the next president, but [a look back at the policies of the Obama-Biden administration](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWl_nJ4pWJzMW8xR7ft9hdNnCW93kvSZ4dnhQ6N7PgQ1c5kbTpV3Zsc37CgHvrW5FlC4j3XD5mbW5SNYS72ZXQH9W1PHHbT2dXfXFN3Vj4ybmkSJ0W5JyJ677zcPKsVMH21F3VT9wbW7gRLzW7Rc37tW76V0_N5M2bKRW6smp2K6fX_-0N6Q-vX4Pzl0fW2hZbSX5b-XlfVv2stG3FsWdWW8p4P_G1d43FhW95D1Gv7Jh2qVW4tQKZS13PL_SVwf4gr6JMSwmN837wfD4x2TWW1z1DNY3hZ1DFW5KhNys7tS8mtW2r55251D1tv8W3b8m_C7zH5sWW5_cHBD7TrCs7W7jfX_m6BK0WtW1lD7lr2fkcTcW3cgrRf10Jg-nW3MDk9S4c6LXTW8dvz1W4q3BWnMWfxzyb9c2_W2jk55B5Bfp2JN7JD5QXmhvpYW4y1gcs44_VxlVcSyh53_L-Q7W7vmjNM7LsXg0W2WktgC3-pwtZ3kPZ1) can serve as a warning to America’s veterans and those concerned with veterans’ issues. During the second term of the Obama-Biden administration, the [Tomah VA Medical Center scandal](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWl_nJ4pWJzMW8xR7ft9hdNnCW93kvSZ4dnhQ6N7PgQ0X5kbT5V3Zsc37CgQv4W3yB7bJ3KrmCrW7dDZ7g54lQpqW3XtfGg4BmY7TW4sMXTN6F2YPKW12j90j8wYQCFW1qGqzP4sVyptVk2rrZ5h-QWWW3RRgf35gF88_W6wgWBW92Q8ptW4c9QVd3mhZTBW84Cr-Q7g1QKpW6f4qRX1FLCPYW4ZBC-V5ByG58W233wtb4jm8ZbN40R2HtbcT0LW6zzGKq8ZwXYhW6BLvzv8nHDw2W10NyLK4pWn2LVN3QwS5hDTknW2vvF8l3MbXcgN3JdrXCcM-hTW345Plk1cRzT7W4Qzp-S3JKNdkW5yjv8_5jkhJCW5f96sw6l6kjjW3Q9dcd5wS4hdVt30JJ9h1rZ0W6bfHVl2lWLhYN6zj4wWVwmh9W2RmV3-4nR3FlW8D3nT96PpkTgW84sDbs51blTY36cZ1) broke wide open. It was one of the often pointed to as an example of the failures of the Obama-Biden administration. Looking at it now, old leadership has been removed and replaced, employee morale is much improved, and – most important – better service is being provided to veterans. As we approach the 2020 presidential election, there are grave concerns about electing Joe Biden, who would return us to the worst excesses of the Obama-Biden administration, with its disrespect, neglect, and mistreatment of our nation’s Veterans. Now more than ever, America needs that confidence and optimism – along with patriotism and unity. We really can’t afford to return to the weakness, negativity, and pessimism of the Obama-Biden administration.
---

---
[ ](https://hs-6023921.t.hubspotstarter-ir.net/e2t/tc/VWl_nJ4pWJzMW8xR7ft9hdNnCW93kvSZ4dnhQ6N7PgQ2p3lGnpV1-WJV7CgLFwW3xLzRy1wtzNzW2-_xMB2C1NntVrTD5T6_sJlPW2HSYF15d-XWzW1srJHv3rwSYLW2mCPSX1BsDw0W18pjRq6XQH6pW1HP8LT12WsHpW2VXXgs3CKTH6W7q_YQg8C79z7W2HkjzT1FD7-ZW34p9zF42kN3yW8BjwYT5v1ZZQW38h-kH608ShdW7QsnSl3WhbLyW90Zqhp8DqMz8N69K5tspFJtpN3S_nXgdq3RxN5p4yXWDVmMpW6DHl6d73VW60W8mPXxv3cgYLwW8gj-mk107WpjVz-J-25bDL-DW1_plJM6jpJ14W6yMr8t3hTP1MW4jVq563x53fD3d2Q1)

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: Team Hagerty Kicks Off Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour
body:
**Team Hagerty Kicks Off Statewide Get Out The Vote Tour** As Election Day quickly approaches, Bill Hagerty today kicked off his statewide Get Out The Vote Tour. Bill met and spoke with conservative Tennesseans in West Tennessee. **Team Hagerty Stops In Madison County** Before the sun even rose, Bill Hagerty was in Madison County talking with conservative Tennesseans and doing interviews with local TV and radio stations. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-r/) Check Out Bill's Interview With WNWS [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-y/) Bill also made time to sit down with the _Jackson Sun_ to discuss why he is the clear choice to represent Tennessee in the Senate. Read the article [**HERE.**](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-j/) After a quick breakfast, Team Hagerty headed to Shelby County. On the way, Bill continued to reach out to Tennesseans to remind them that Election Day was on Thursday and asked them to send the TRUE Trump conservative to the Senate.**Walking In Memphis** In Memphis, Bill spoke with local television stations about the need to provide law and order in our country and that he would stand with President Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to support our law enforcement officers. Just as the President said in his tweet, Bill will stand tall on law and order. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-t/) On the way to Union City, Bill and his team spared no time and called conservative Tennesseans - informing them that Bill Hagerty is the only conservative who volunteered full-time for six months to help Donald Trump defeat Hillary Clinton.**Media Is Not Given, It 's Earned**While in Union City, Bill sat down with WQAK/KYTN to provide an update on the campaign and how he will work with Senator Marsha Blackburn to defend our Tennessee conservative values. Bill and the team capped off the night with a burger and milkshake from PV's Hut - a must-have when in Union City. [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-i/) To stay up to date with Bill's tour, follow along on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and Parler at @BillHagertyTN. | [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-d/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-u/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-o/)| [](https://hfs.cmail20.com/t/t-l-phttlhd-fuutjhhtj-b/)
---|---|---|---

Read the article After a quick breakfast, Team Hagerty headed to Shelby County. On the way, Bill continued to reach out to Tennesseans to remind them that Election Day was on Thursday and asked them to send the TRUE Trump conservative to the Senate.Walking In Memphis In Memphis, Bill spoke with local television stations about the need to provide law and order in our country and that he would stand with President Trump and Senator Marsha Blackburn to support our law enforcement officers. Just as the President said in his tweet, Bill will stand tall on law and order. On the way to Union City, Bill and his team spared no time and called conservative Tennesseans - informing them that Bill Hagerty is the only conservative who volunteered full-time for six months to help Donald Trump defeat Hillary Clinton.Media Is Not Given, It 's EarnedWhile in Union City, Bill sat down with WQAK/KYTN to provide an update on the campaign and how he will work with Senator Marsha Blackburn to defend our Tennessee conservative values. Bill and the team capped off the night with a burger and milkshake from PV's Hut - a must-have when in Union City. To stay up to date with Bill's tour, follow along on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram and Parler at @BillHagertyTN. | | | | ---|---|---|--- Team Hagerty 4515 Harding Pike Suite 110 Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Shall not be infringed
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Patriot,
I will always uphold and defend our Second Amendment rights. As a concealed carry permit holder and the wife to a first responder, I am adamant about protecting this most basic American right. This issue is personal to me and my family.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u_A9NRnMpVVXGlTF8jnhpkv9bcjc3MSRMqO6cosYrGQ8I-aWB97fepgufJJ5m7zGH2VezaElzk7ARRyxnxp_CVA3ysn1SL5s6Nc2IeKoSdgIq2H5j7TGAiU368TZs2dySNF6JT6gDLDq_IPCVTFn-g==&c=EW0PkwMdiX9fpsW2nydCkZjG3jfjITXj13PdjGLkQ26EIHRF8TE1FQ==&ch=td_Jzq5_pNUDbvPZ3ejxDjmrxfFCMQFCB8yFtwZGrTDdCdNRIghK6A==)
---
|
[Please take a moment to watch my story.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u_A9NRnMpVVXGlTF8jnhpkv9bcjc3MSRMqO6cosYrGQ8I-aWB97fepgufJJ5m7zGH2VezaElzk7ARRyxnxp_CVA3ysn1SL5s6Nc2IeKoSdgIq2H5j7TGAiU368TZs2dySNF6JT6gDLDq_IPCVTFn-g==&c=EW0PkwMdiX9fpsW2nydCkZjG3jfjITXj13PdjGLkQ26EIHRF8TE1FQ==&ch=td_Jzq5_pNUDbvPZ3ejxDjmrxfFCMQFCB8yFtwZGrTDdCdNRIghK6A==)

I am a board member for the Alachua County Friends of the NRA, so I have put my beliefs into action by working to defend our right to keep and bear arms in our own community.
Furthermore, when I worked as Representative Ted Yoho's Deputy Chief of Staff, I was proud to work on legislation to protect our gun rights on Capitol Hill. You can be certain that when elected to Congress, I will stand resolute in defense of our Second Amendment. We cannot be a free nation without the right to carry, and I vow to defend that at every turn.
If elected, I will proudly protect gun owners, both on Capitol Hill and right here at home in FL-03.
[Please consider chipping in to my campaign to help ensure we have an advocate for our Second Amendment in Washington. ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u_A9NRnMpVVXGlTF8jnhpkv9bcjc3MSRMqO6cosYrGQ8I-aWB97felWsrD_p9rBcIqkQMwT7uzOEefs3YvzkWGBDs-1v3tQZY6TcZFZLgMFBbRCMKDuqTh-rxKPhfdAIGE6Zc9FgTUymXV0V7q-9XBFE7fypn-iIHX3LyMe88Ts=&c=EW0PkwMdiX9fpsW2nydCkZjG3jfjITXj13PdjGLkQ26EIHRF8TE1FQ==&ch=td_Jzq5_pNUDbvPZ3ejxDjmrxfFCMQFCB8yFtwZGrTDdCdNRIghK6A==)
---
| In Liberty,
---
|
---
|
Kat Cammack Constitutional Conservative Candidate for Congress, FL-03

|
#
Hello, As Amy’s campaign manager, I spend every waking moment thinking about our path to victory on Election Day. A big portion of that involves our own budget, but the number that has me most worried right now is this: **$1.2 million.** That’s the amount of cash on hand Jeff Van Drew reported at the last FEC deadline. Unfortunately unlike Van Drew, we’re starting the general election from scratch after our upset victory in New Jersey’s primary. **We need to close this budget gap -- and fast -- if we want to compete with the avalanche of attack ads sure to come our way in the fall. clean_body: | Hello, As Amy’s campaign manager, I spend every waking moment thinking about our path to victory on Election Day. A big portion of that involves our own budget, but the number that has me most worried right now is this: $1.2 million. That’s the amount of cash on hand Jeff Van Drew reported at the last FEC deadline. Unfortunately unlike Van Drew, we’re starting the general election from scratch after our upset victory in New Jersey’s primary. We need to close this budget gap -- and fast -- if we want to compete with the avalanche of attack ads sure to come our way in the fall. Will you pitch in $10 or more right now to help? Hi! It’s Cecilia, Team Espy’s finance director. I know you typically hear from me at the end of the month or quarter, when we’re coming up on a major fundraising deadline, but I’m reaching out to you today because **August is a notoriously tough month for campaign fundraising.** _Even more so during a pandemic._ We’re now only 90 days away from the general election, which means we have 90 days left to help Mike connect with Mississippians across the state, get our ads on the air, spread our message far and wide, and mobilize more voters than ever before. That’s a lot to do in just three months, but with enough grassroots support, we _can_ do it. Mike came within a single digit of defeating Cindy Hyde-Smith in 2018, closer than any Democrat has come to winning a U.S. Senate seat in this state since 1986. We can help Mike make history this November and move Mississippi forward along a brighter, stronger path – but only if we continue to hit our fundraising goals along the way. **With that said, can you chip in $10 or whatever fits your budget this month to help our campaign get off to an early start and ensure we hit our August fundraising goal?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18554858/232278501/-931496894?refcode=em-200805-august&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzAyYzk1My0zMmQ3LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7FC5JCjXPmPIvgGMMdN9Qg6FY-Axsw4bFDkcGLtKVg=)

If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. name: =?utf-8?B?VGVhbSBTw6FuY2hleg==?=
subject: Our fight for voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez
body:
[**Join the thousands of Americans demanding Congress restore the Voting Rights Act >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-A3fkzn0himrp5933FIkUqjyCYgvqUKV_Vbvp-rBOcU=/qoaVRaC-xLku3GVlabC-lOrOKTS_IMFgRIxuG0B50g8=?code=Sánchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-A3fkzn0himrp5933FIkUqjyCYgvqUKV_Vbvp-rBOcU=/qoaVRaC-xLku3GVlabC-lOrOKTS_IMFgRIxuG0B50g8=?code=Sánchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
We're 3 months out from Election Day. With so much on the line this year, it's **imperative** that every eligible American has the opportunity to vote in this election.
That's why Linda is demanding Congress restore the _Voting Rights Act_ __ of 1965, which outlawed discriminatory voting practices and made voting easier and _safer_ for Black people and people of color.
Unfortunately, in the 55 years since the _Voting Rights Act_ was passed, our country has backtracked. Between unnecessarily strict voter ID laws, the purging of voter rolls, and the closing of polling stations, voter suppression now runs rampant. _**Enough.**_
We believe that no matter your race, zip code, or political party, voting should be easy, safe, and _accessible. _
[**Help us protect voting rights | SIGN YOUR NAME >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-A3fkzn0himrp5933FIkUqjyCYgvqUKV_Vbvp-rBOcU=/qoaVRaC-xLku3GVlabC-lOrOKTS_IMFgRIxuG0B50g8=?code=Sánchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-A3fkzn0himrp5933FIkUqjyCYgvqUKV_Vbvp-rBOcU=/qoaVRaC-xLku3GVlabC-lOrOKTS_IMFgRIxuG0B50g8=?code=Sánchez&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Flinda-sanchez-for-ca38%3Frefcode%3DX_080320_VotingRightsActJA_A)
Thanks for taking action,
\-- _Team_ _S anchez _

name: UPDATE - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: "The most competitive state on the map"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
More observers upgrade Georgia to a toss-up. |
---
**Friend, two more nonpartisan analyses have upgraded Georgia to a TOSS-UP state!**
**Georgia is one of the states that "will likely prove decisive in selecting the direction the country heads,"** according to CNN.

**"The demographic trends continue to move in Democrats' favor" in Georgia,** according to NPR.

So it's no surprise that this week one election expert called Georgia **"the most competitive state on the map right now."**

**Friend, 2020 is the year Georgia goes blue.**

The American people have had enough of the failed leadership of Republicans like Donald Trump and David Perdue. _It's time to elect reformers like Democrat Jon Ossoff to lead us out of this public health and economic crisis and back to prosperity._

name: Jason Yates
subject: TONIGHT: LIVE Conversation with Promise Keepers
body:
| | My Faith Votes is live streaming tonight!
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200805com01&n=1)
| Peter, Join us tonight, Wednesday, August 5, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT, for a live conversation with Ken Harrison, Chairman and CEO of _Promise_ Keepers. _Promise Keepers_ is focused on reuniting, rebuilding, and inspiring men’s hearts to seek after the Lord. We’re honored to be partnering with _Promise Keepers_ to help men bring their faith forward to lead in the public square and through their vote. This is a conversation you’ll not want to miss. It’s vital to the health of our families, our communities, and our country. I look forward to gathering together with you this evening on **Facebook** and **YouTube**. Don't miss it! You still have time to [RSVP](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200805com01&n=2) and submit a question. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iXf3gw0SBkD1n0daNPbuHzTaHj0Mb_nvECtkIXngmd6T&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200805com01&n=3) Standing for biblical values, Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e200805com01&n=4)
---
* * *

name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht?=
subject: What happened in Nevada can happen in YOUR state!
body:
Our worst fears have been confirmed: they are forcing implementation of mass vote by mail for the general election. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2bf34177ddc6/what-happened-in-nevada-can-happen-in-your-state?e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| | | [ ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=375fbfb19e&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
| |
_**Those who think these are temporary changes are sorely mistaken.**_

---
# Friend,
Have you seen what happened in Nevada this week!? The Nevada Assembly passed AB 4 – a bill that codified a statewide mass mail-in election - and opened the door to widespread election fraud.

**I'm deeply concerned about the precedent this sets for _PERMANENT MASS VOTE BY MAIL. _**Every time a precedent is set in one state it threatens every state.

[This is what I warned about in April when True the Vote ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=92c55c5399&e=ad8cba7e98)[filed suit against the Secretary of State n the U.S. District Court for the District of Nevada](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=be869aa66d&e=ad8cba7e98), arguing that the mail-in-balloting plan** _ _ removed safeguards against fraudulent votes and violated citizens**’ **constitutional rights.** We sued before the election changes had been codified by the legislature...now those changes are law.

At the time, we were scoffed at by many who said it was unnecessary because ... surely ... the changes were only intended to impact the primary. So, we were alone on the battlefield. Fast forward a few months and now our worst fears have been confirmed. The Nevada legislature has implemented mass vote by mail for the general election. And make no mistake this will NOT stop with Nevada.

**There are currently over seventy lawsuits and bureaucratic fiats being pushed by a radicalized Leftist agenda, all aimed at PERMANENTLY changing election laws across the country. **

[_**Engineered chaos will destroy the integrity of our elections. We must fight back**_ _** NOW before it is too late!**_](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=b8d4ed1f61&e=ad8cba7e98)

Mass mail voting exploits error-riddled voter registries, sending official ballots to a roster of inaccurate names and addresses. There are NO Voter ID requirements, NO reliable provisions for signature comparisons....it's a vote harvester's dream scenario, it is now legal in Nevada, and it's coming to your state soon unless we take action to stop it!

| [DONATE NOW TO FIGHT BACK ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=31ad5094c0&e=ad8cba7e98 "DONATE NOW TO FIGHT BACK ")
---
| **With your help, True the Vote will continue fighting to bring the truth to light**.

We will continue working with election officials, attorneys general, secretaries of state, and others all over the country to bring awareness to the risks of mass vote by mail.

We will continue in courtroom battles to protect the constitutional rights of fellow voters.

We will continue training citizens to participate in our elections, to serve at the polls and on committees to review incoming mail ballots before they are counted.

We will continue planning for Election Day and post-election support operations.

We will continue doing all we can to ensure that our elections remain free, fair, and secure for voters of all beliefs and backgrounds.

We only have 90 days until Election Day. There is a tremendous amount of work to be done \- and we can't do it without your help. [**_Contribute today and let's work together to protect election integrity for all voters._**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=7c33c95c73&e=ad8cba7e98)

And above all - never, never, never, never quit. America is worth fighting for!

Onward,

Catherine Engelbrecht
Founder
True the Vote
---
| **P.S. Keep track of breaking news by following us on [Facebook](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c9af63442d&e=ad8cba7e98), [Twitter,](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5e29e5a4a2&e=ad8cba7e98) and [Instagram](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=f3b971c8b5&e=ad8cba7e98)!**
---

---
| | [](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=92fd0e51e8&e=ad8cba7e98)

You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=65fa0bffcb&e=ad8cba7e98&c=dc61259e56).

name: Delaying the Election?? (via protectvoting.org)
subject: He's TERRIFIED you'll vote, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Peter, we're up against a president who is terrified your voice will be heard on Election Day. **AND NOW HE 'S TRYING TO STEAL MORE TIME IN THE WHITE HOUSE!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b68/2082791000/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2") We need to act on Universal Vote-by-Mail now before it's too late to stop him! **We need 5,000 of our grassroots supporters to send a message to Congress today:[We MUST pass Universal Vote-by-Mail NOW to ensure we're ready to vote before November 3! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b6b/2082791000/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+We+MUST+pass+Universal+VotebyMail+NOW+to&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2")** | | | [We CAN'T wait: Pass Universal Vote-by-Mail! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b6a/2082791000/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+We+CANT+wait+Pass+Universal+VotebyMail+r&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2")
---
_**THIS IS SERIOUS.**_ President Trump is hoping we'll get so down to the wire he can buy more time to figure out how to defeat Joe Biden -- _or even worse SUPPRESS more voters._
_**We must all demand action NOW to get Vote-By-Mail in a place that we can ALL vote on or before ELECTION DAY![Add your name to our 5,000-supporter strong petition calling on Congress to step up and pass Universal Vote-by-Mail IMMEDIATELY!! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b6d/2082791000/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+to+our+5000supporter+stron&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2")**_
| | [Pass Universal Vote-by-Mail NOW!! ->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b6c/2082791000/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+Pass+Universal+VotebyMail+NOW+rarr&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2")
---
_We cannot let President Trump win by default..._
Republicans are currently winning this fight by fear-mongering and delaying this legislation to the point of no return!! We must all _RISE UP_ and get off the sidelines _TODAY_ and demand we pass Universal Vote-by-Mail before it's too late.
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0367/72412298/4b426340/61066b6f/2082791000/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200805_VBMdelay_U2_X2")
Together we can get this done,
\-- the Voter Protection Project

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: ugly lies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The Trump campaign is back on the air |
---
Peter,

It's been a whirlwind of a month for the Trump campaign, but when it comes to spreading deceitful and misleading lies about Joe Biden to the American people, they're staying true to form.

**[Let us get you up to speed -- and then we're going to ask you to take the next step by making your first $5 contribution to help fight back against Trump's ugly lies»](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")**

**FIRST:** Donald Trump took a major slide in the polls this summer, free-falling in many of the major battleground states that will decide the results of this election.

**THEN:** Last week, Trump's brand new campaign manager conducted another message "reset," taking all of their ads off the air for a few days.

**BUT NOW:** The Trump campaign is back on the air in Electoral College battlegrounds Arizona, Florida, Georgia, and North Carolina. _And instead of making the case for himself, Trump's new ads go back to their same old misleading claims._

Peter, we know that so long as we're able to fully communicate our own message, we can set the record straight to undecided voters. We can stop the Trump campaign from buying votes through lies and fear-mongering.

Thanks to grassroots support from this team, we've been able to get our own ads on the air in Arizona, Florida, Michigan, North Carolina, Nevada, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin. They're incredibly effective, Peter, but we need a lot of new donors to step up today to keep them running strong.

**[Peter, this is an important moment in the campaign to double-down on your support for Joe by making your first contribution of $5. Your donation will be critical in funding our ad program and ensuring we can counteract Trump's ugly lies. Can you dig deep and pitch in that $5 or more right now?](https://go.joebiden.%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")**
| **[Biden for President Supporter Record](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_august_nd?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.05_B1_dtnewads_X__F1_S2_C1__nd-full")**

clean_body: The Trump campaign is back on the air | Peter, It's been a whirlwind of a month for the Trump campaign, but when it comes to spreading deceitful and misleading lies about Joe Biden to the American people, they're staying true to form. "" FIRST: Donald Trump took a major slide in the polls this summer, free-falling in many of the major battleground states that will decide the results of this election. THEN: Last week, Trump's brand new campaign manager conducted another message "reset," taking all of their ads off the air for a few days. BUT NOW: The Trump campaign is back on the air in Electoral College battlegrounds Arizona, Florida, Georgia, and North Carolina. And instead of making the case for himself, Trump's new ads go back to their same old misleading claims. Peter, we know that so long as we're able to fully communicate our own message, we can set the record straight to undecided voters. We can stop the Trump campaign from buying votes through lies and fear-mongering. Thanks to grassroots support from this team, we've been able to get our own ads on the air in Arizona, Florida, Michigan, North Carolina, Nevada, Ohio, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin. They're incredibly effective, Peter, but we need a lot of new donors to step up today to keep them running strong. | Derek, This November, everything is on the line. If the Democrats take power and win, here's what we'll be looking at in 2021:
* A New Hampshire Income Tax
* Repeal of Republican Tax Cuts
* Increased Taxes on Granite State Employers
* Infringements on our Second Amendment Rights
* Far-Left judicial nominations

It will take all of us working together to make sure we elect Republicans up and down the ballot and defeat the Democrat agenda before it's too late \- and I'm asking you to commit to vote. Granite Staters are fired up about our Republican candidates, and it’s a testament to the incredible success of Trump Victory NH, our unified organizing operation for Republicans campaigns up and down the entire ballot. Trump Victory NH has held hundreds of virtual events, with thousands of energized volunteers who are phone banking and door knocking every week in communities across the state to remind voters how much is at stake. By voting in-person on November 3rd or by casting your Absentee ballot beforehand, you'll ensure that our Republican candidates get across the finish line and win this November.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Look at these numbers . . .
body:
Early voting started this week in Florida and Republicans have taken an 8% lead in turnout in my home district.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127386-684992771e-eb08c23d8c)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127386-684992771e-eb08c23d8c) Early voting started this week in Florida and Republicans have taken an 8% lead in turnout in my home district.

And we need to keep pushing!

[**Help me drive voters to the polls by donating $10 today.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127383-2aa1b59626-eb08c23d8c)

**We have our ads running until SATURDAY then our budget runs out!**

After Saturday we will still have another eight days to go until Primary Day and we need to raise $8,000 EACH DAY to keep them going.

Any amount you can contribute will help us out. Every dollar you can donate helps us reach 40 voters ONE TIME with one of our commercials.

**[$10 helps us reach 400 Voters.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127383-2aa1b59626-eb08c23d8c)
[$25 helps us reach 1,000 Voters.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127384-cfd2edbf10-eb08c23d8c)
[$100 helps us reach 4,000 Voters.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127385-5a656e35d5-eb08c23d8c)

** We have to build the number each and every day and have the biggest turnout of Republicans in the history of this district.

Without that, the Leftist Media is going to have a field day and do their best to discourage voters on Election Day in November.

We can’t let that happen.

[**Chip in whatever you can and help us keep our ads on the air.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-387103-912686-5127386-684992771e-eb08c23d8c)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Darin LaHood
subject: This is a new low for Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Mike Madigan isn’t just wrapped up in one of the worst corruption scandals in our state’s history – he’s fundraising off of it! [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=1d000d70c9b642a2bab8b3fbdd233f83&_e=IadcgN1h1h69GNpWUGEPnxduC4YEk5XLZrwbbpREm_A31Q2j6Z-XZ5tXHIcn_CiD6VTykV9pCPODK6G-KxSU75mUZ9ekssF6AZLaT1j7aJ8sunKw0zRm8ovDITxsS_evr2nRyQH1ozwqgrW3KCfWbG-mYvAQ4ldH_RDdLFpKH2oUdYipFr-P2lLlI-elcPjvKXMgwJn5RQKRVA0VLWza_t6p5M_P4fYF6OQ2hHeR_G2rdHEV6gyJtsTo1WW_Cr_SVPVmSbTBzlmWQLha8-XDqdzK1eowF7XQniEXMC2J_YcRPF3PAS5n0Yw6WIBxbl6C36cTRAbbzBoe929g-o_TeuiOqJOr6HqSzilS1Zld06xI3iss11z13S8SmaGm181KOrZ0cgYAu6K-mMQvovX9qE2mA_x2FOiWY78ectjYlcS0qI-znJL_jiRftha7UFTY1vkSs7-WeUD8-ujw10m0A5TBPdOo7lpvsfZtSwS8g1Y%3D) | |
---
Friend,

Illinois politics has been far too broken for far too long, and the situation is only getting worse.

After 49 years in Springfield, Mike Madigan has built a legacy for himself defined by corrupt dealings – which have shattered the public’s trust and cost taxpayers **hundreds of millions** in lost funds year after year.
[**ADD YOUR NAME: TELL MADIGAN TO RESIGN**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=1d000d70c9b642a2bab8b3fbdd233f83&_e=IadcgN1h1h69GNpWUGEPnxduC4YEk5XLZrwbbpREm_A31Q2j6Z-XZ5tXHIcn_CiD6VTykV9pCPODK6G-KxSU75mUZ9ekssF6AZLaT1j7aJ8sunKw0zRm8ovDITxsS_evr2nRyQH1ozwqgrW3KCfWbG-mYvAQ4ldH_RDdLFpKH2oUdYipFr-P2lLlI-elcPjvKXMgwJn5RQKRVA0VLWza_t6p5M_P4fYF6OQ2hHeR_G2rdHEV6gyJtsTo1WW_Cr_SVPVmSbTBzlmWQLha8-XDqRTl3CQklI67WMGkADJHr8odwDzrx7zgkEJ-NEni2L0YVacIfn_CKdnDGyp17nsEvwwfq_AoDuC2W8lF9s6P49x6XMQIx-SldDpCN1FlAA1MJR6rIPyORhIGkr4JyUmVH_JjZ-TzdWwzv-XTUfKNpaBm9U8JVcfsslSqJyxnd3USWP9TwQOYA6gvTh-l2tO2vl3UMZjUPEyrig5PBxS3mPk%3D)
It gets worse.

Not only was Madigan implicated in one of the worst scandals in Illinois’s history just a few weeks ago – he’s been shamelessly fundraising off his crimes in an effort to pay for legal fees!
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=1d000d70c9b642a2bab8b3fbdd233f83&_e=IadcgN1h1h69GNpWUGEPnxduC4YEk5XLZrwbbpREm_A31Q2j6Z-XZ5tXHIcn_CiD6VTykV9pCPODK6G-KxSU75mUZ9ekssF6AZLaT1j7aJ8sunKw0zRm8ovDITxsS_evr2nRyQH1ozwqgrW3KCfWbG-mYvAQ4ldH_RDdLFpKH2oUdYipFr-P2lLlI-elcPjvKXMgwJn5RQKRVA0VLWza_t6p5M_P4fYF6OQ2hHeR_G2rdHEV6gyJtsTo1WW_Cr_SVPVmSbTBzlmWQLha8-XDqYFnvpNrWBJQEC0ZkgTW10p6KPF4_4UBVpCVTNcnA3Td9lp-14TfWvWBnTlzfdaYw0gfunOX3dCeGZ9Crtsv48jNg8Gvulh6IGJBDQb8z_6lrfePfVbQLjxrkDmQM9bw3TuO7WdvZ4PxkqIL4kgI7Zr6B0KQ5mMFlTpDscdD4ap_VciquXKQjg8oEw4wuGsWsHEPsyxhVpiCRySKjK2gdBY%3D)
**Friend, this is a new low for Illinois politics. Madigan’s refusal to resign in the face of this scandal shows a clear lack of character and a lack of respect for the people of Illinois.**
[**ADD YOUR NAME: TELL MADIGAN TO RESIGN**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=1d000d70c9b642a2bab8b3fbdd233f83&_e=IadcgN1h1h69GNpWUGEPnxduC4YEk5XLZrwbbpREm_A31Q2j6Z-XZ5tXHIcn_CiD6VTykV9pCPODK6G-KxSU75mUZ9ekssF6AZLaT1j7aJ8sunKw0zRm8ovDITxsS_evr2nRyQH1ozwqgrW3KCfWbG-mYvAQ4ldH_RDdLFpKH2oUdYipFr-P2lLlI-elcPjvKXMgwJn5RQKRVA0VLWza_t6p5M_P4fYF6OQ2hHeR_G2rdHEV6gyJtsTo1WW_Cr_SVPVmSbTBzlmWQLha8-XDqQyQLzjTMRMLif4Hr1tu5L4_pU-qeK2wuZnBSf28qwRTbBkcgW4u6K1sbht2jazN2zN4FWZp_h2UovZO72QS8SaEReo_P4RR5iyMOBDg135JUQJ6cU3JLFcLrhS9ZIh_R1Bzms_Alavm8LpN1q_xc6Qlh0MHfNb_Lch9dynF1Sfrtms9hpm3jgr5IeOMWg3AtznS4M0_7HltRY9WuBSi678%3D)
We can’t count on corrupt politicians like Mike Madigan to hold themselves accountable. It’s our job to root out corruption wherever we find it, and that starts with firing Madigan and ushering in a new generation of responsible leadership in the land of Lincoln.

Thank you,
Darin LaHood

name: =?utf-8?Q?Troy=20Downing?=
subject: Our State Trust Lands
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TROY DOWNING FOR MONTANA
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Our State Trust Lands** **Tens of millions of dollars are generated every year to support Montana public schools through stewardship of our State Trust Lands. ** **This is not a small chunk of change. ** **There are five seats on the Montana Board of Land Commissioners including the MT State Auditor. ** **The Montana Constitution states specifically that these lands are to be “[used] for the support and benefit of the various state educational institutions...” ** **Some of Montana’s most critical industries depend on permits and leases on these Trust Lands--many of our farmers, ranchers, miners, and loggers rely on these lands to create jobs and grow our economy- to put food on the tables of Montana families.** **We also care deeply about recreational and sportsman’s access to all of our public lands, and about preserving everything we hold dear on our amazing public lands. ** **As a member of the Land Board, I am committed to the ideas of multiple use and sustained yield for our public trust lands. ** **By “multiple use”, we need to look holistically at all of our land and decide where the land is best used for recreational or sportsman’s use- what makes sense for grazing cattle, what makes sense to farm... The “sustained yield” part means simply to be stewards... to manage our treasured resources in a way that we can do it forever.** **We are expected to maximize income to fund education, but we are also expected to sustain these lands for future generations.** **My opponent’s only articulated position on this very important issue is simply that we need to protect public access. ** **Access is important. We all care deeply about preserving that. I personally have spent a tremendous amount of volunteer time and money helping build and maintain trails and access on our public lands. My sweat, dollars, and heart are invested deeply in preserving and protecting this legacy.** **But this issue is much more complicated than a simplistic position that orbits around a single issue that we all agree with. ** **If we mismanage, disregard, or do not understand the importance of generating money for our schools while supporting the Montana economy, we are left with two difficult decisions...cut funding or raise taxes- neither of these options are acceptable. ** **This is why it is of paramount importance, to all of us, to elect candidates who actually understand these issues. We need candidates who have real, practical experience running businesses, with strong records of service (military and otherwise), and who have the experience and courage to lead us through these difficult times. We don’t need more lobbyists, lawyers, and politicians looking to secure a career in politics by running for offices that they don’t understand.**
---

body:
It’s official! We won the primary election in Arizona’s first district. I want to thank you and all of my supporters for electing me to be your | | | [](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=50430a4b534e4551a31f86ecf48504aa&_e=-dZaY5hYelVBK24C8shiVAc_Q72lzSc_goOZXwOUcAh1hzgqP9cpZ4zWZ-Ny_yf71q3YKluashrLzk5tSd8vyk7tF3Wol8XZz_Yf_nxu-o7XL2N9m-UHxWjK-XdSGvgRsvFWMzDHQgmO9e85NwU3s5TejCN3gdYrFaIS2cjc-CwF2EPMhBkt2nl0hhtZyt6573O4nqMyyA4RBGfxFz-kwW7cfL6L7CQLL9jRlux-9syDyJ2RGXkCZ1FKdro3Lg3Ikm3NYyIo08xOo49NQ8Fv_ETpbBOC8RmzSZpBFEkAt7Y9UsbrofCnuTEXdlveEZ-qdkidVMpNFPh2KO_rQj-XKIcddBSgxYcaAageMbWly7QJgxY0aZ3M9E1OWREkQoNqXAQpMsLQdXDLC8immf3Vf9CUgNf3l4tGAVMInhxsZH8yScl_A3hmvtbZhBMhcvpBsZUuAaA9PhPKhEeGL6eZVb_v00WUM8ujEjflqGH8FVg%3D) It’s official! We won the primary election in Arizona’s first district. I want to thank you and all of my supporters for electing me to be your Democratic nominee for Congress for the third time, and I look forward to continuing to take on Washington to get results for our communities. Now, we need to focus our attention on winning the General Election. We know Super PACs will spend millions to defeat me -- they have before and they will again. We need the resources to fight back. [**Can you chip in $10 and help set the stage for another victory in November?**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=50430a4b534e4551a31f86ecf48504aa&_e=-dZaY5hYelVBK24C8shiVAc_Q72lzSc_goOZXwOUcAh1hzgqP9cpZ4zWZ-Ny_yf71q3YKluashrLzk5tSd8vyk7tF3Wol8XZz_Yf_nxu-o7XL2N9m-UHxWjK-XdSGvgRsvFWMzDHQgmO9e85NwU3s5TejCN3gdYrFaIS2cjc-CwF2EPMhBkt2nl0hhtZyt6573O4nqMyyA4RBGfxFz-kwW7cfL6L7CQLL9jRlux-9syDyJ2RGXkCZ1FKdro3Lg3IzRlr7Vglz9LPY9d0Rsjait-mmcQS6ICdW9Tsg-POXeR8vpTaBa6xOsNfHaVXN9cuW3G6jqXo46q7Ih4nykizCUINfvXv-hxR7pDAoJdLRvMdt0UeAckS_cFGk25bW6M6GxKEGFZKLeA5tdUfsdSpcV1NSjhNQajrpCjlUzPiQcZG_AFsPnJPefZMUMGUbJ94bcscNf9h3bGOuyTGfM91VP_p1eAPh8oKVHwETozTPx0DJLtqQwt3jPE5rhVEgB6i) Lastly, I want to thank all of the amazing volunteers who helped get out the vote in this election and all of my incredible staff who put in the hard work to ensure we had a strong turn out. It’s because of you that we were able to win this decisive victory. Thank you,
Tom O’Halleran

name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Re: Corruption
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Here's a copy of Perdue's "Boardroom" invitation! |
---
Friend,

**David Perdue, the sitting Senator from Georgia, offers ridiculous perks to lure big-money donors.**

**He calls it "The Boardroom," and he's been doing it since 2017!**

Here's a copy of an actual menu of options to buy his time that Perdue sent out: [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b8/5b2c1286/3e7d05eb/25f1c78e/185204086/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_05_crpt1") Friend, honestly, we at Jon Ossoff HQ still can't get over it.

**Here we are asking our grassroots supporters for $5 or $10 or $20, while Jon's opponent is offering receptions at island resorts for thousands of dollars in contributions.**

_Perdue even has different "Boardroom" levels: "Entrepreneur," "Innovator," and "Chairman," which requires an investment of $5,400 from each person or $7,500 from a PAC._

**Does this sound like someone who is fighting for everyday Georgians and working families? Or is David Perdue just using his Senate seat to look out for the interests of his "Boardroom" Chairmen? **

Jon Ossoff's campaign isn't taking contributions from any corporate PACs or federal lobbyists -- we are fueled by small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, friend.

**[So, right now, can you contribute a few bucks to elect someone who will reform this corrupt system?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b8/5b2c1286/3e7d05eb/25f1c78e/185204086/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_05_crpt1")**

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** August 4, 2020
**Subject:** David Perdue's "Boardroom" donor program

Friend -- I lead a team of journalists who investigate and expose corruption for news organizations all over the world.

**These anti-corruption investigations often require my colleagues to go undercover. But friend, in American politics today, the corruption is right out in the open.**

Take my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue. **He has a donor program literally called _"The Boardroom,"_ whereby he offers corporate lobbyists an ornate menu of special access to the Senator -- for a price, of course.**

For $7,500 a year, a "chairman" level corporate donor receives quarterly events with Perdue, a yearly resort retreat on the private island where the Senator lives, and an annual reception at Perdue's lavish island residence.

**[Friend, David Perdue's blatant pay-to-play corruption must end. Chip in $20 to help me defeat him.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b8/5b2c1286/3e7d05eb/25f1c794/185204086/VEsO/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_05_crpt1&amount=20")**
| [Chip in $20 immediately >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b8/5b2c1286/3e7d05eb/25f1c794/185204086/VEsP/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_05_crpt1&amount=20")
---
**Friend, David Perdue's elite "Boardroom" donor events even take priority over his _actual Senate work_.**

Last year, the Senate Armed Services subcommittee held a key hearing over substandard and unhealthy housing at military bases, including Georgia's own Ft. Benning.

_Every subcommittee member was there -- except David Perdue._

**While military families were testifying before his subcommittee about threats to their health and safety, David Perdue was at a "Boardroom" meeting wining and dining corporate donors and lobbyists.**

**Friend, I am running for Senate to clean up the mess that corrupt officials like David Perdue have made.**

_(And I hope it goes without saying that I won't skip out on committee hearings to sell favors to corporate donors. In fact, I'm refusing donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.)_

**[Today, if you're ready for a Senator from Georgia who will fight corruption, please chip in $20 to my campaign>>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b8/5b2c1286/3e7d05eb/25f1c794/185204086/VEsHBQ/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_08_04_crpt1?refcode=em_2020_08_05_crpt1&amount=20")**
