He calls it "The Boardroom," and he's been doing it since 2017! Here's a copy of an actual menu of options to buy his time that Perdue sent out: "" Friend, honestly, we at Jon Ossoff HQ still can't get over it. Here we are asking our grassroots supporters for $5 or $10 or $20, while Jon's opponent is offering receptions at island resorts for thousands of dollars in contributions. Perdue even has different "Boardroom" levels: "Entrepreneur," "Innovator," and "Chairman," which requires an investment of $5,400 from each person or $7,500 from a PAC. Does this sound like someone who is fighting for everyday Georgians and working families? Or is David Perdue just using his Senate seat to look out for the interests of his "Boardroom" Chairmen? Jon Ossoff's campaign isn't taking contributions from any corporate PACs or federal lobbyists -- we are fueled by small-dollar donations from grassroots supporters like you, friend. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" We're honored to count you as a supporter. Thanks for being with us. \- Team Ossoff \-------- Begin Forwarded Message --------- From: Jon Ossoff (iPhone) To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Date: August 4, 2020 Subject: David Perdue's "Boardroom" donor program Friend -- I lead a team of journalists who investigate and expose corruption for news organizations all over the world. These anti-corruption investigations often require my colleagues to go undercover. But friend, in American politics today, the corruption is right out in the open. Take my opponent, GOP Sen. David Perdue. He has a donor program literally called "The Boardroom," whereby he offers corporate lobbyists an ornate menu of special access to the Senator -- for a price, of course. For $7,500 a year, a "chairman" level corporate donor receives quarterly events with Perdue, a yearly resort retreat on the private island where the Senator lives, and an annual reception at Perdue's lavish island residence. "" | "" Friend, David Perdue's elite "Boardroom" donor events even take priority over his actual Senate work. Last year, the Senate Armed Services subcommittee held a key hearing over substandard and unhealthy housing at military bases, including Georgia's own Ft. Benning. Every subcommittee member was there -- except David Perdue. While military families were testifying before his subcommittee about threats to their health and safety, David Perdue was at a "Boardroom" meeting wining and dining corporate donors and lobbyists. Friend, I am running for Senate to clean up the mess that corrupt officials like David Perdue have made. (And I hope it goes without saying that I won't skip out on committee hearings to sell favors to corporate donors. In fact, I'm refusing donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists.) "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Together, we can get government working for the people again, Jon | This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com "" | "" | P.O. Box 450326, Atlanta, GA 31145 PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE

body:
When I published an op-ed in the New York Times calling for the military to help stop the violence in the streets the left totally melted down. Sadly, we are now seeing the tragic results of the left-wing agenda to defund our police and allow anarchists to take over our cities. If the left wins in November, we'll see this everywhere.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMjQ4NDUS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDQyMTIxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

Liberals in Portland defunded the police, allowed anarchy in the streets, and attacked federal law enforcement.

The result? Near-record violence.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMjQ4NDUS1&kn=12&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDQyMTIxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Sadly, we are now seeing the tragic results of the left-wing agenda to defund our police and allow anarchists to take over our cities.

If the left wins in November, we'll see this everywhere.

Peter, I need your help to fight back. [**A donation of $10, $25, $50 or even $100 will help defeat the radical, anti-police Left.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMjQ4NDUS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDQyMTIxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDMxMjQ4NDUS1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDQyMTIxMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Gov. Kasich has been active talking about the stakes of this election, how we all have a role to play in healing our nation [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c09361b3b85b45ec80999d4d5bbd008d&_e=_2cIykfa15YmnpgfG1qF4R1p5C2ekBZzQ6dDa0C5e2iR5l40AvorTXEX4_YdOkh41hsPxYceEZXBx0BMbjRoz2upu2jQNM6F1ge9U_0ovxeJUelu6LyY-xHlulh92CBuTs1YLtt5VotwFRdlMFRcGLXd0ADuZYpu_xTqtYO2oyj9EydDuoB7A-Yhwq6Xqn5RPpfDLSS4vgWnsmFJXQork89EQyKdtkoSRfMPV2uVUVlw9PHKwMwVS5c_BCRu0aagWbYjHwc6lTboopmmMDJA1g%3D%3D) | |

Peter - we hope that you and your family are safe, healthy and doing OK getting through these difficult Covid-19 times. We truly are all in this together.

It's hard to believe that Election Day is about 90 days away and early voting in many states will begin much sooner than that. Gov. Kasich has been active talking about the stakes of this election, how we all have a role to play in healing our nation and how the looming threats from climate change require our leaders to take bold actions now.

Please see below a summary of his recent activities and we'd ask that you consider sharing these with your friends and family!
|
---
**Boston Globe Op-Ed:**
[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c09361b3b85b45ec80999d4d5bbd008d&_e=_2cIykfa15YmnpgfG1qF4WZA8NVSx5OLk49xNJd4qTjebnv6gnb48igb3cypWps9WHRwYnU7RJoiil3B_ZKbANXBzspNRMGy_ksPh8095Gk2NtbtWLgL7mnievlBFVmfUIeyMFMVSXH5wI9Ib0kF04zl5nGBpUUFwUU6QsvSctqtxJICfutp9vYdhC4Z75mt6DsAZYfAojJSi29BwXj_EZiPU6zMkLbIvBQBQNGRPBKRB2YGRHas-Ks5vtUZvxPWcHgaXrYBzUl8FYgMnFFqKlUhV5LkeoEdR2sB7Ymr3JrcDueQfK1Wf4MnCgw3lbx8KduIgyoEjY0MFaO_XYjPLwMwaJf_8jeFBtjyZX7Uh1o%3D)
_"Haven’t we all had enough? Aren’t we sick and tired of losing our way? I know I am. And, as a life-long Republican, I find it’s been enough to override my sturdiest political attitudes and party loyalties for as long as this crisis lasts..."_

_"Americans must find our way again. Just as we can no longer tolerate the path we are on, we must also reject the temptation to protest one man’s divisive and mean-spirited acts with division and meanness of our own."_
[Read More](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=c09361b3b85b45ec80999d4d5bbd008d&_e=_2cIykfa15YmnpgfG1qF4WZA8NVSx5OLk49xNJd4qTjebnv6gnb48igb3cypWps9WHRwYnU7RJoiil3B_ZKbANXBzspNRMGy_ksPh8095Gk2NtbtWLgL7mnievlBFVmfUIeyMFMVSXH5wI9Ib0kF08x3hDz862YEtzwX_9ks2vrxFkvAwQVLn8dKgv1y7TOa-J2_8zI-2EMX8PVYt8MVsaGNf0lwT8Cu84fT4mGtq72kYxuu7n2HaDk9KfEy-Dc0KmkGyUNor4yySLC7fsdaJEQffVWZdTKsl8aPqcsex0AbQI43Bn_XJBuPDxdnsgQC_Cyca1ApY8eueHn7zYm85_xG9OxZ3BCniAsQCMVbJKc%3D)

clean_body: Gov. Kasich has been active talking about the stakes of this election, how we all have a role to play in healing our nation | | Peter - we hope that you and your family are safe, healthy and doing OK getting through these difficult Covid-19 times. We truly are all in this together. It's hard to believe that Election Day is about 90 days away and early voting in many states will begin much sooner than that. Gov. Kasich has been active talking about the stakes of this election, how we all have a role to play in healing our nation and how the looming threats from climate change require our leaders to take bold actions now. Please see below a summary of his recent activities and we'd ask that you consider sharing these with your friends and family! | Boston Globe Op-Ed: "Haven’t we all had enough? Aren’t we sick and tired of losing our way? I know I am. And, as a life-long Republican, I find it’s been enough to override my sturdiest political attitudes and party loyalties for as long as this crisis lasts..." "Americans must find our way again. Just as we can no longer tolerate the path we are on, we must also reject the temptation to protest one man’s divisive and mean-spirited acts with division and meanness of our own." | TIME Op-Ed: "Though often regarded as a hot potato in politics, one of the biggest points of opposition to addressing climate change is the cost. I approach it differently, however: how can we afford not to?" Gov. Kasich also had a conversation with Kiera O'Brien, former president of the Harvard Republican Club who now leads Young Conservatives for Carbon Dividends. Both are a part of and spoke about conservative & bipartisan ways to tackle climate change. | Recent Interviews: : "President Obama is wrong to call on the U.S. Senate to eliminate the filibuster. It is a rule equally important to both parties as it forces compromise on the big issues that impact all Americans." : "It is outrageous that we have a president sowing doubt in the institution of voting. It's ridiculous and saying there is widespread voter fraud is completely unfounded. It simply isn't true. What a sad situation for our country." | Thank You! Thank you for all that you're doing to keep yourself, your family and your community safe during this time. If you'd like to chip in to support Gov. Kasich's message, . -Team Kasich | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.www.JohnKasich.com

name: Joe Biden
subject: I'd be grateful for your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I can't do this without you. So I'm asking for your endorsement today. |
---
Peter,

I've been honored to have so many great leaders join us in the battle for the soul of this nation and endorse our campaign to beat Donald Trump.

It means a lot to have the support of many of my great friends and colleagues, and I'm humbled by and grateful for their endorsements.

But Peter, even with Senator Sanders, President Obama, Senator Warren, Speaker Pelosi, and Secretary Clinton, on my side, I can't do this without you. So I'm asking for your endorsement today.

**I didn 't see your name on our list of endorsers, so I wanted to give you another chance to make your official endorsement before we finalize our list.** [Peter, if you stand with me in this fight, will you add your name before midnight?](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fe/617207264/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS") | | **Record for:** [Peter Willis](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fd/617207264/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "http://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS")
**Endorsed Joe Biden for President?** Not yet!

| [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fe/617207264/VEsF/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS")
---
I'm so grateful to have your support. We're all in this together, and I know we have what it takes to win.

It's going to be a difficult battle, but there's nothing that can stop us when we're united.

**So, Peter, if you could add your name to our list of endorsers today, it would really mean the world to me. I 'll be looking for it.**

[https://go.joebiden.com/Endorse-Joe-Biden](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fe/617207264/VEsC/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Endorse-Joe-Biden?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_PET_2020.05.05_B3_jrb-endorsejoe_X__F1_S2_C1__ns_RS")

Thank you and stay safe,

Joe
| | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fc/617207264/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.facebook.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fb/617207264/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://twitter.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79fa/617207264/VEsB/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/joebiden") [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f9/617207264/VEsO/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.instagram.com/joebiden")
---

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f8/617207264/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f7/617207264/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f6/617207264/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f5/617207264/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f4/617207264/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f3/617207264/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f6/617207264/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). If you'd only like to receive volunteer emails, [click here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f2/617207264/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/volunteer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f5/617207264/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931ba68/1cd0ac28/17cc4db45/357d79f1/617207264/VEsHDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team
Paid for by Biden for President

clean_body: You don't want to miss this. | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | Trail Update | Friends, It was a busy week in the district for me and the team! Did you see us out on the campaign trail? My team was waving signs at early voting locations. I also had the pleasure of speaking with the Marion County Tea Party. It was wonderful to be able to update these patriots on the progress of the campaign. I was honored join Sal Russo, co-founder and Chief Strategist of Tea Party Express, for a national town hall. You can view that town hall == | | == | | == | We just released a brand new video titled, "Lay an Egg." The video outlines how I will work with President Trump to build the wall, protect life, and defend the Second Amendment. == I look forward to seeing many of you in the district this upcoming week. God bless, Kat | Building Team Kat | | Mayor Gib Coerper of the City of Alachua supports my campaign for Congress because he knows that he can trust me to advocate for what is best for our district. Watch his video == | == | | | | == | | Chairman Gayward Hendry of the Clay County Commission supports my campaign for Congress because he knows that I will always fight for our farmers. Watch his video == | | | | | Mayor Brett Peterson of Cresent City supports my campaign for Congress because he knows that I will always be an advocate for Putnam County. Watch his video == | == | On Social Media | == | I shared my closing statement from the Republican Liberty Caucus of Northern Florida Candidate Forum on social media. In my closing statement, I detailed why I will always fight with President Trump and stand up to "The Squad." == | | | | | I am honored to have placed first in the straw poll conducted by Republican Liberty Caucus in Clay County. The momentum and support is clearly on our side as we head towards election day. | == | In the News | == | | Florida Politics recently wrote about my ad titled "Greatest Threat." "The ad, "Greatest Threat," features clips of the social unrest that's unfolded across the country contrasted with images of some of the most influential leaders and thinkers in American history, including Abraham Lincoln." | | | | The Capitolist wrote about my recent ad. "The ad, titled 'Sovereign,' outlines the existential threat of illegal immigration on the United States' sovereignty and features Cammack's commitment to stand with Trump and make America a safer place... Cammack, a small businesswoman and former Deputy Chief of Staff for Congressman Ted Yoho, says that illegal immigration at the southern border presents a number of issues for the country." | == | How You Can Help | == | Join Team Kat In the coming days and weeks, we will continue to build out Team Kat with volunteers from across the district. I would love to have you join our team! If you would like to help our team in any way, please click == to sign up today! | | == | | | | My team and I are excited to distribute more yard signs! We also will have a number of 4' x 4' and 4' x 8' signs available upon request. If you would like a sign for your yard, please click == to reserve your sign today. A member of my team will then deliver the sign to your home. Thank you for your support! | == | | | | == | | We are working hard to execute on a winning strategy, and every dollar raised helps us toward victory next month! If you are able, please consider clicking == to make a contribution to the campaign. body:

| | **Tomorrow is primary day in Tennessee!** A couple of days ago, we told you that we need to fill our Primary Day Fund with $25,000. So far, we've brought in $13,923. [_**We need to raise $11,077 more and we have less than 48 hours left to do it. If you can, rush in a contribution now ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d7/18d6a294/4c723c28/26d7ec0b/2105023973/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA4MDUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200805?refcode=jme200805_m_other&refcode2=107423") | | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0d7/18d6a294/4c723c28/26d7ec0b/2105023973/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA4MDUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200805?refcode=jme200805_m_other&refcode2=107423")

body:
It is truly an honor to have Obama on our team. | | | Hey there — making sure you didn’t miss the big news: **President Obama just endorsed Mondaire!** Coming from a man who knows a thing or two about making history, it is truly an honor to have Obama on our team. **[Join Obama in supporting Mondaire’s history-making campaign by making a contribution today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zchnSWExfrGq9Qrh3Qr2ufVoNwAX1I2Xo6mFyRptzi-0pbnu2GUBVLLCARUUpCqTxJNEdvf5dCZNdgzISKe06-So_tQfXoFAYuWYm2hy0adxR1zjOPdATaFfXR6Y0hbIQnIfwOC4zYNGnV4dZAbkw6ae2oqKmq9CLHj2plKWeoB4l2Sr-X9RRyEeWcxykRMQ4ratHlTfUGkXWz9IwJBbpp60d0ZGrw5UzOBuzf-ek3ja-Wqb7IH4JXog2RJOPE8wKi910NTSxmBuwMy4SmOfX-vfnyIHeFlblTr7a8-baPVAjmHD5AgFjwtrTzpLksWEpqjSfrVv9l0HTgnlaLFUWfE30-Ye-qVRblmeb-Ts_FOa3GNpnLj56eR0wIXTsqEWA/342/bF4AwhUnS_yMBd2DhUmjig/h0/YI9KC5rQ_DGCopIYD55QV_UQlYZrGnLBspzP_0Lh7H4)** Thanks for your support!
-Team Mondaire
* * *
[
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zchnSWExfrGq9Qrh3Qr2ufVoNwAX1I2Xo6mFyRptzi-yW7fHh1U5qinPdX1A18vKGv67gN-VgNKU1BXgjhPOEunA5xShJ_twmHnZzDppCz-kcXNZ-gy3G50JPe6VabbAvy9TXvsWts4pCozBpC9nmRq6oF_kFAe6NuCtjMIXhjG2TLp7zFpUxWj_yJkT6BWvf3Ra7q1-QakqiM8oJUIA9X7K1eJGEoH529S66vXdu19ZkpQllPopgtjlsWX502dQzUvRdY11Q_MIGGBoFF9qF7kn8NFoSgYmUpPCUAFju0AW5e5K7ZoOTrdI1H2fym9yuMytl2Bcarj84eW7ThXWHXovo8F3Rtouo2MOKLc6dT23LUUBlWdmkjyDJRjHFMeF0/342/bF4AwhUnS_yMBd2DhUmjig/h1/lbzyks9cSewxHQKrkv-YOfBHr_avTY1NBbJnSAdGYtE)
Friend,
It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States.
One year later, I was a young staffer working for President Obama in the Department of Justice on judicial nominations and reforming our criminal legal system.
Today, I am humbled and honored to tell you that President Barack Obama just endorsed our campaign.
**_[Join President Obama in supporting our campaign.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zchnSWExfrGq9Qrh3Qr2ufVoNwAX1I2Xo6mFyRptzi-xORnneW2AGUwvCa7vrx80Wj6NNQNlouZ-8zJIanTTBRje09i4At66lZapmvka6Jgr6BTzjzk1Shosvx3KfvqH4Je1KDL2YdowUaDBfLZxm5xGMkebdQ5n53Vmtk8x2aV1akhtHkFbJnAX96yKS-lcw4QudndIEF9b2KvnvfgGaztJwA4C8sYNMdkokNcZEijzSVmDkWifymh2zTx5ExnRFqbgEpbTkKqo4xlNzNvdWbTgDPvyBQQTfiLQgT6McaaQJ9FjDt9w3pBlBT6Yu8p0oX6HeM-UduDtAES4m0YOnyz-7kV99WyyY8tu0R37pJICkIupF3CkVdExMoe0Nvhe4/342/bF4AwhUnS_yMBd2DhUmjig/h2/6F1neVT7egyYr-YmFWqryViTmsWZ7bjcFaqE_Tf0uug)_**
In his first wave of endorsements, President Obama said: _“Together, these candidates will help us redeem our country’s promise by sticking up for working class people, restoring fairness and opportunity to our system, and fighting for the good of all Americans — not just those at the top.”_

clean_body: It is truly an honor to have Obama on our team. | | | Hey there — making sure you didn’t miss the big news: President Obama just endorsed Mondaire! Coming from a man who knows a thing or two about making history, it is truly an honor to have Obama on our team. Thanks for your support! -Team Mondaire Friend, It was not too long ago that I was knocking on doors for then-Senator Obama in Nevada, during his first run for President of the United States. One year later, I was a young staffer working for President Obama in the Department of Justice on judicial nominations and reforming our criminal legal system. Today, I am humbled and honored to tell you that President Barack Obama just endorsed our campaign. In his first wave of endorsements, President Obama said: “Together, these candidates will help us redeem our country’s promise by sticking up for working class people, restoring fairness and opportunity to our system, and fighting for the good of all Americans — not just those at the top.” I’ve said this before and I’ll say it again: growing up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, I never imagined that someone like me could run for Congress — let alone decisively win a competitive Democratic primary. name: Team Warner
subject: ethical, moral, and logical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

After failing to adequately protect Americans from the deadly COVID-19 virus, Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are now **refusing to help Americans through the economic crisis that has resulted from their failure of leadership.**

Mark Warner and his Democratic colleagues in the Senate are working to pass the next round of COVID relief, which would extend the enhanced unemployment insurance beyond July. It would also help state and local governments pay essential employees like teachers, firefighters, and sanitation workers. Plus, this bill would ensure that small businesses get the relief they need. Thousands of small businesses -- especially minority-owned businesses -- have not yet received the relief loans they were promised.

Mark Warner is working hard to hold the Trump administration accountable and make sure every American gets the relief they need. **Now, we 're asking for your help to make sure he stays in the Senate, fighting for us. [If you have the means, will you chip in to help keep Mark in the Senate?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db6a/53d9897e/540eff85/1c8829f6/3329437260/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-lessthan3mos?refcode=20200805_f_1_nd__696__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

There's a clear ethical, moral, and logical choice this November: electing Democrats up and down the ballot. The Trump administration and GOP-controlled Senate's handling of the coronavirus pandemic left many Americans out in the cold. We have the power to make a change, but to flip the Senate blue, it's crucial that we keep leaders like Mark Warner in the Senate.

**[Please, help us get back on track.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85db6a/53d9897e/540eff85/1c8829f5/3329437260/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-lessthan3mos?refcode=20200805_f_1_nd__696__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

name: Julian Brave NoiseCat
subject: As damning a tale as any told
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
This is good news. But it's not the full story.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG) Friend, Last month, after years of resistance by the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe and their allies, a judge ordered the Dakota Access Pipeline to shut down. This is good news. But it's not the full story. Before I tell you the story -- and it's as damning a tale as any told about this nation's dealings with its First Peoples -- I'm going to ask you to use your voice today to support Indigenous Peoples around the world and across the country. **[Please add your name now to tell moneyed fossil fuel interests that you won't stand idly by as they disregard Indigenous rights and something as basic as access to clean water.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/667?t=3&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/667?t=4&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG)
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/667?t=5&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG)
---
Though you've probably already heard much of it, here's the synopsis:
An oil pipeline (which counted Donald Trump as one of its investors) was rerouted from the predominantly white city of Bismarck to run directly through the treaty lands and drinking-water supply of the Standing Rock Sioux Tribe. When the tribe protested and filed a lawsuit, the National Guard was sent in. Protestors and activists who came to support the Standing Rock Sioux were met by weapons of war -- in fact, some of these federal agents were _better_ armed than militaries, with weapons like surface-to-air missile launchers.
After months, President Obama intervened, ordering an environmental review. But days after his inauguration, President Trump reversed the decision, and oil began flowing through the pipeline later that year.
While last month's news that the pipeline must be emptied is undoubtedly something to celebrate, this is not the first or last battle in this centuries-old fight. The history of the Dakota Access Pipeline just shows how precarious Indigenous rights are and how committed we collectively need to be to protecting and advancing those rights.
**[We're just getting started in the long fight for Indigenous rights and clean water. Sign on today to show you stand with the Indigenous community, too.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/667?t=6&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG)**
Thanks,
Julian Brave NoiseCat
Member of the Canim Lake Band Tsq'escen and a descendant of the Lil'Wat Nation of Mount Currie
Advisory Board Member, Evergreen Action
Vice President of Policy and Strategy, Data for Progress
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/667?t=7&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1936%2E53494%2Erd6QIG). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Rita Review [July Edition]
subject: Monthly Newsletter -- via Team Rita
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/_Kf6frGBBMWdyXr2Q5nc2k76DfyMgVZaWGFOkb4_D48=?refcode=200805-email) _Welcome to the August edition of The Rita Review! Before we dive into July events Rita wanted to give you a message about attacks from her opponent. Please watch and then come back to see what we 've been up to. _ [__](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/Qsg-39j8zzS8PtOaqwSjLRcydgAnT5Q5mMxW2SROvaI=?refcode=200805-email) **Back-to-School Roundtable** Thank you to everyone who joined Rita's back-to-school roundtable. It is so important for our children we get this right. Rita is committed to leaning in to listen to every voice. "There is so much on the line. It's on everyone's mind," she said. "I've found that when we face a challenge, we do it in a collaborative way. You listen to those most affected by the problem." "If the communities are healthier, then it's more likely there will be success with school," she said. "We're all in it together, but you have to reduce the spread of the disease. The only way to get through this is to do our part." It is so important for our children we get this right and Rita is committed to leaning in to listen to every voice. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/3BYViKOyLP6qB7MO4BuVdrUyAEWze8oa3Svv0cEUOR4=?fbclid=IwAR3gaBeogTOC_L0bZ_trqNyY-vRP2897PsIIFKLdbPf0fNEVoJu8SwpUpPU) **" Iowa children urgently need our elected leaders to lead on COVID-19 and school" \- Rita's Op-Ed** "...We have to recognize there is not a one-size-fits-all solution to this problem. The right solution for Iowa City might not be the right solution for Ottumwa, which won't be the right solution for Calamus-Wheatland. Rates of infection and risk factors vary from district to district. Every district and community needs to be able to make the right decisions for their parents and students."

**[Read Rita's op-ed on why our elected leaders need to be partners with parents, students, teachers, and school districts, not issuing orders.](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/we7y8ykAVXLc4mBiFQT6BJNZcDdsQzIw3uQgHaOeCtk=)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/we7y8ykAVXLc4mBiFQT6BJNZcDdsQzIw3uQgHaOeCtk=) **Virtual Rally with Rob Sand** A big thank you to Rob Sand for joining more than 60 supporters for a virtual rally! Our IA-02 field team is fired up and working hard. We know that Iowans vote for people, not party and we're excited to spread the word about this campaign! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/KPMJNVB1XYpn6DZQ8tXka-dGTFr-WLb_j1cwNtXYk-Q=) **4th of July** Happy 4th of July from Rita! Rita gave the reminder that there is a lot more that unites Americans than divides us as we work to build a more Perfect Union.

Happy Independence Day! [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/9liOPyO506NQVi9xYoDZW48Aer26fz7MjpMp1UVse6Y=) **Farm Updates** The power of Mother Nature was on full display earlier this month. Rita had around 60 mile an hour winds at the farm. Fortunately, no green snap so it could have been a lot worse. I hope you and your family stayed safe. When disasters (hail, wind storms, pandemics) strike, reasonable people roll up their sleeves and go to work alongside their neighbors, clean things up, and start over. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/gARV53JISUsbB4eY9KRMBJEK5uwNa1V7kmIb7BacNXU=) **Reaching Voters** Rita was working hard and calling voters across the district most evenings during July. She had the opportunity to speak with Steve, a postal worker and registered Independent. They discussed how important mail delivery is to the local economy and rural areas. Steve is dedicated to his job and his community. We must support workers like him. If you want to help us reach voters, sign up here: [https://www.mobilize.us/hartforcongress/](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/bGYKI7-4AE3fntxVohAO4COz8RKTNstCPfWu-G0pniI=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/bGYKI7-4AE3fntxVohAO4COz8RKTNstCPfWu-G0pniI=) **Less than 100 days till Election** There are less than 100 days until Election Day! Whether you are a Democrat, Republican, or Independent we want you on Rita's team. She is ready to:
1. Tackle corruption by banning members of Congress from becoming lobbyists, cracking down on insider trading, and passing campaign finance reform.
2. Protect coverage for Iowans with pre-existing conditions and lower prescription drug costs by letting Medicare negotiate better prices
3. Invest in schools, skills-training, and apprenticeships and support small businesses so we can bring back jobs.

She has the support of people from all walks of life. Join us! **End Citizens United Virtual Rally** Rita hosted a virtual rally and was joined by End Citizens United's president Tiffany Muller! They discussed Rita's plan to tackle corruption in Washington:
1. Banning members of Congress from becoming lobbyists
2. Cracking down on insider trading
3. Reducing the amount of money in politics
4. Drawing fairer districts
5. Encouraging vote-by Mail

Read more about it **[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/zGdSVSjO7tkHAZ5idmh-azrBvSPHmvVFCBD68_pmEjg=?fbclid=IwAR0hhjISQEl_kM6vvJrsa3R6BdjLWHVrt4kNZrYi7bOQLEdO13x7uYOIMGM)** _That 's it for the latest edition of the Rita Review. We're continuing to travel and listen to the stories of every single person in Iowa's 2nd District, and we couldn't do it without your help. The best part about campaigning is being able to engage in our community, and it's thanks to supporters like you that we can keep doing so._ _\- Team Rita_ | ____**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/_Kf6frGBBMWdyXr2Q5nc2k76DfyMgVZaWGFOkb4_D48=?refcode=200805-email)**____
---
____ ____
____ ____
____ ____
____Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
---
____
____Rita Hart for Iowa
P.O. Box 333
Wheatland IA 52777 United States____
____If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/PkdKujy9aEn8sIKJYswERtOAiWm7pgN2HI6QLrVcK7s=/zqS1NMfNM1KVo5VarUjSMfdPPwcEesPZA0bS5ZLuLPc=).____

____** **____

name: Jay Inslee
subject: My opponent
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Loren Culp will put politics over people.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8119%2E868730%2EMkC_MC) _We are going through great challenges and upheaval in both our country and our state. If you would prefer not to see campaign emails in your inbox right now,**[please click here to take a pause for a few weeks.](https://act.jayinslee.com/signup/snooze/?t=4&akid=8119%2E868730%2EMkC_MC)** Thanks, and take care._ Friend, Today marks the first day of the general election. To every Washingtonian who supported me, who put their trust in me, thank you. I'll fight like hell to make you proud. Ballots are still being counted, and you'll get to know Loren Culp, my opponent, more in the days ahead, but we can tell you this: _My opponent supports Donald Trump._ _He will have the support of the Republican Governors Association and their multi-million dollar war chest._ _He will build his campaign on rolling back every bit of progress we've made together._ The fight will be tough, make no mistake. But as long as we continue to stand up for our values of fighting for working families, providing protections for the vulnerable, and building opportunities for the next generation, we'll win. That starts now, with an investment in the work ahead to fight back against Culp and the GOP this November: **Fight back against Donald Trump, fight back against extremist politics, and support the progressive work needed to put people first:[Donate $5 or more now to support my campaign for reelection for governor of Washington.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10388?t=5&akid=8119%2E868730%2EMkC_MC)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/10389?t=6&akid=8119%2E868730%2EMkC_MC)

Jay

subject: Still time to ENTER

body:
For decades, the Chinese Communist Party has been stealing from our very own backyards, taking research funded by American taxpayers, all to benefit i Peter, For decades, the Chinese Communist Party has been stealing from our very own backyards, taking research funded by American taxpayers, all to benefit its own military and economy at our expense.
In addition, through their mismanagement and lies, Communist China allowed one of the largest global pandemics in recent modern history to take countless American lives.
Not only that, but Peter, the FAR-LEFT has refused to hold the Communist Regime accountable for their lies.
Time is up.
**[Will you help me immediately stand up to China and stop them now?](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=5a96d732332b4e0ab4471a1aec49618c&_e=3ACnqhVbtNHBH5lLIsoFiyHemoSJTRbuhKjEFazrZ3fIPUrKOjQcEHs2Xuqki09-qUoO55FIMuORWwbj0CpW4yOgbB_OcdN_ewwBGdDUOJLdbeqXRAl__mzp8c437zXziyTvA5v4dscAg8QSEwppYOkEA4zzaf0oy8jpCTqqCC6bsYLyULNo1bg_u6HetlQaRzpJDY5RaP9nJZqwDzNkrZcIdKd_BJdTPMOblpol59dEKmHoUOTu5hnVVOUI1AAFXxR3y9cFgIlyn5PxuOofu6p9RCnPGbgr-dCSbFInxNzndVKsWWPpZIdxYz4fymrgPgfwTYJc-f8h5Bm8dh-P-zu1fVuvL3O6JaEJ7J-CR93HdW1EEhc8yI-dqRzrVg_IyH3Gg6cRPmezcZa1qc0UcSu3R4eD_Nlz84QlUTpXPXw%3D)** [**HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE**](http://links.robportman.com/u/click?_t=15c7a5d863b14bd0a136c4fe6499ad25&_m=5a96d732332b4e0ab4471a1aec49618c&_e=3ACnqhVbtNHBH5lLIsoFiyHemoSJTRbuhKjEFazrZ3fIPUrKOjQcEHs2Xuqki09-qUoO55FIMuORWwbj0CpW4yOgbB_OcdN_ewwBGdDUOJLdbeqXRAl__mzp8c437zXziyTvA5v4dscAg8QSEwppYOkEA4zzaf0oy8jpCTqqCC6bsYLyULNo1bg_u6HetlQaj9DLVIJlAO0dFm7ZFc4lusBv2I4NXu8fv2wU0S3to8ExhQ99NhbwUc1NidCwn4qbAK73tgKR9dlY5NQN3QnufgA_3MNpk1MXPMd2wlayU8k9YMt7H2pVk5X6dbNZy8kr7zwnD3-2MB37-r240x6Bwqn1kwGkyGfG8X2STTU4eqj4WUP-uR0bWGBtZ4-IE8LrnatA_nVVsBwk-64r8qe3kIddafiPCvYLZsVCkzo_K18%3D) China must be held accountable, and COVID-19 is just the tip of the iceberg. **[Will you join me immediately in helping stop them? name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Faster testing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Delays in testing have been a major area of concern. Increased demand around the country has led to longer turnaround times--sometimes as long as a week or more. That's unacceptable, and fixing this problem has been a top priority. Today, I have some good news to share on this front.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ylGl4r8bNh2To7MT8gUMcna82ePPF7iauure09gYK6rWOiiRvFZIHW6l8FMYftiQx4VAFHpGQCstQk0j0qS2f6TZrB2pZRqGxpm4Mi00XAwRNkwmnnhzEnb86X7YK-P470Emp7HjGt7l41JsqnCC0wTC26T0s5nIlqiA5hVDbXQQdSl7ar0RiZGQ_IK0k1xlMZunBbyQNjXMCpAt-UgeDvYEF2aUQ-mPCubXFgVsOvA=&c=UnGlkCRv_O97TtjCcWWL14pichY9KkzwH-oZH_HOGqpfqmFzBO7Ovw==&ch=4xaK2Qz65NCM26HhHjM9O33R6By9GaGbf1nLl6Bq0Y_V6hno-rocfQ==)
---
| After a competitive bidding process, Rhode Island has contracted with two labs - Accu Reference and Dominion Diagnostics - that are going to majorly expand our testing capacity and guarantee us results within an average of 48 hours. Starting next week, Accu Reference and Dominion will each run 1,000 Rhode Island tests per day - 2,000 in total. By next month, Dominion will increase their capacity to 7,000 tests per day. That will bring us up to 9,000 tests - including Accu Reference, Dominion, the State Health Lab and some other private labs - that are providing results in 48 hours or less.
I hope this news encourages more Rhode Islanders to get tested. If you have symptoms - even if it's just a little cough or a runny nose - we need you to get tested. Starting today, we are expanding our asymptomatic testing to every Rhode Islander 18-39 years old. If you are in this age group, please go to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ylGl4r8bNh2To7MT8gUMcna82ePPF7iauure09gYK6rWOiiRvFZIHafRPbe95HDhNc1eYDX-OyxrXNCUeGr_8ct8FHg_lrjAtyj1lkMV6S5k6mssgVXEl4VYmzj6S245bGEBIFETn2I=&c=UnGlkCRv_O97TtjCcWWL14pichY9KkzwH-oZH_HOGqpfqmFzBO7Ovw==&ch=4xaK2Qz65NCM26HhHjM9O33R6By9GaGbf1nLl6Bq0Y_V6hno-rocfQ==) and sign up for a test. We know 18-39 year-olds have a higher percent positive than others, and we also know this group is more likely to have the virus without any symptoms, so the ability to get tested is another tool to keep you and your loved ones safe.
Finally, if you are planning to travel to a state that requires a COVID test in order to avoid extended quarantine, you will now be able to get tested here. Beginning this afternoon, you can sign up for a test at [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ylGl4r8bNh2To7MT8gUMcna82ePPF7iauure09gYK6rWOiiRvFZIHafRPbe95HDhNc1eYDX-OyxrXNCUeGr_8ct8FHg_lrjAtyj1lkMV6S5k6mssgVXEl4VYmzj6S245bGEBIFETn2I=&c=UnGlkCRv_O97TtjCcWWL14pichY9KkzwH-oZH_HOGqpfqmFzBO7Ovw==&ch=4xaK2Qz65NCM26HhHjM9O33R6By9GaGbf1nLl6Bq0Y_V6hno-rocfQ==). The testing will take place at our Convention Center site and we will work as hard as we can to get you results within 24-48 hours.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ylGl4r8bNh2To7MT8gUMcna82ePPF7iauure09gYK6rWOiiRvFZIHZsbJgM3YWsDsZjx-mIu0a1lBDn8RL52mWFIMX8bHhygkYfcC27sJ-Bf98fm6l1wL1jnFsCtnyhhu6Z5R1FNG0dfJHx1ipBj4dfBlq-ZLhkxWfbbn5ep9niEU6AAFnOL08bnH4uOymD7LfwV00iffmI=&c=UnGlkCRv_O97TtjCcWWL14pichY9KkzwH-oZH_HOGqpfqmFzBO7Ovw==&ch=4xaK2Qz65NCM26HhHjM9O33R6By9GaGbf1nLl6Bq0Y_V6hno-rocfQ==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ylGl4r8bNh2To7MT8gUMcna82ePPF7iauure09gYK6rWOiiRvFZIHZsbJgM3YWsDsZjx-mIu0a1lBDn8RL52mWFIMX8bHhygkYfcC27sJ-Bf98fm6l1wL1jnFsCtnyhhu6Z5R1FNG0dfJHx1ipBj4dfBlq-ZLhkxWfbbn5ep9niEU6AAFnOL08bnH4uOymD7LfwV00iffmI=&c=UnGlkCRv_O97TtjCcWWL14pichY9KkzwH-oZH_HOGqpfqmFzBO7Ovw==&ch=4xaK2Qz65NCM26HhHjM9O33R6By9GaGbf1nLl6Bq0Y_V6hno-rocfQ==).
---
| I want to be clear: expanding testing will help us contain the virus, but it does not replace the other steps you need to be taking. You should still be social distancing, wearing a mask, and keeping your groups small. We also need your help in preventing people from engaging in behavior that puts Rhode Islanders at risk. That's why we are setting up a new Crush COVID unit in the Rhode Island State Police to crack down on social gatherings. If you see a large social gathering, we've set up a hotline specifically for this unit: (401) 764-5554.
The State Police will be working with local communities to educate and to enforce. If we all recommit ourselves right now to getting more serious about wearing masks and keeping groups small, we'll be able to continue our forward momentum. We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d11d8bcc-1a8d-4d25-9bf4-cc4e396f398c)
---
[Update Profile](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=oo&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=d11d8bcc-1a8d-4d25-9bf4-cc4e396f398c) | [About our service provider](http://www.constantcontact.com/legal/service-provider?cc=about-service-provider)
Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) powered by

name: SERIOUS [via Jon Ossoff HQ]
subject: Friend, Perdue is trying to CUT unemployment insurance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Benefits expired while the GOP sat on its hands. |
---
Friend,

We knew this public health and economic crisis would last well beyond July.

**So, as millions of Georgians have filed jobless claims, what is Sen. David Perdue doing? He is calling for *CUTS* to expanded unemployment insurance.**

**Perdue and the GOP sat on their hands for months, and now federal unemployment benefits have expired, and the Paycheck Protection Program is set to stop giving out loans _this weekend_.**

_The House passed the Heroes Act nearly three months ago(!!!) to extend essential benefits. But Mitch McConnell refuses to take it up in the Senate._

The GOP hasn't figured out what it wants to put in the next relief bill. It had no trouble rubber-stamping billions for big business, but there seems to be no rush to renew benefits for out-of-work Americans. Meanwhile Donald Trump is demanding money to remodel the White House.

**Friend,_Perdue and the Senate GOP are holding working Americans hostage_ as a bargaining chip to extract concessions.**

**The American people need relief _now_.**

**[Sign Jon Ossoff's petition to demand David Perdue reverse his push for unemployment insurance cuts and urge the Senate to extend unemployment benefits and direct relief for families, workers, and small businesses.](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b4/5b2c1286/3e6136df/25f1c56c/3689295741/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/perdue-cut-ui")** | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e20b4/5b2c1286/3e6136df/25f1c56c/3689295741/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://go.electjon.com/page/s/perdue-cut-ui")
---
Thanks,

Team Ossoff

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Wesley Hunt Condemns Lizzie Fletcher's Anti-Law Enforcement Rhetoric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
# _**Wesley Hunt Condemns Lizzie Fletcher's Anti-Law Enforcement Rhetoric**_
For over two months, citizens in Portland have exercised their Constitutional right to gather and peacefully protest police brutality. While many of the protestors have lawfully exercised their rights, extremists in their midst have wrested control of the demonstrations and unleashed a wave of chaos and destruction in our cities. These agitators are violently targeting local and federal law enforcement officers, seeking to destroy a federal building, and terrorizing local businesses.

Last week, Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher chose to ignore these acts of destruction and violence, and instead condemned the very law enforcement officers in Portland who are putting their lives on the line to defend local businesses, federal property, and law and order. Her letter, co-signed by radical Democrats Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib, makes no mention of the violence and property destruction threatening Portland and other cities throughout our country.
_**Indeed, since the protests first turned violent, Fletcher has yet to make any public comment condemning the rioting, looting and violence bringing destruction and instability to our communities.**_

Democrats up and down the ticket, including [Presidential candidate Joe Biden](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5b6d4a692df8454ab501e7ebc66e8f2e&_e=ZSwsgPQGhvt1BkUzGzKY-oHu1huOjRt3xIOfhggab6QsCyo9DcMy1ELETSu12XykULKrj5grRjlOhPFkiZfTp2qsC_6r5e7UTseIja5ebHJJ7BC3oarnv0tdJABKh-0LojkR7Dp4lwI5Uro2jY2euzbk7m9BTJH_h5bWSwOTzGbxQQID_NIlf2J512l6_yq4MBcD_XMJTnzKYTv9IB3oEjUkMg0ndfdVkXmpzR-YnK78ReE0wy0ojZOenxx-VKe_j89jcdPSM0c__7j1cFuJ-ZsQna4NOH6r7-C-l2lzlso%3D), are advocating to redirect police funding and reassign the responsibilities of law enforcement. With a voting record that falls in line [with Nancy Pelosi 99% of the time,](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5b6d4a692df8454ab501e7ebc66e8f2e&_e=ZSwsgPQGhvt1BkUzGzKY-udYmiNdSgWUtNxi24qLGxqXKGhtsQlATDfklw7RJimos_heprglcdooWy6ntwOm97qz6bTXgvWnmPXLmybTJUndV-yknB6zS05PSCgn8DDHL5O-2rkMOi92DXHSR_jCyw-Utu0wXrY8Td7eEL9lmkI2DZwmCmZwbvhz3qOU_M4PUBY7KYFWtF1qmVU-wxdb1L0PQNWiriS4kW89bVPFkHFZRQfKwBIreuv_gKTYWAdyMC5IGBbad2Oc6nHZ4iLZo8-0_SVu4EQr-8l4tBUf6tgvR35SgP2K1xNlqKJlYtoUcaJBlJoTvFhdlUxZh85G6snXlDiivosaZi0Lv5bQRTyDBtNnomX5ms3gk5WZ6KWY) Lizzie Fletcher has proven that when push comes to shove, she’ll stand with her party not her district. When the time comes to vote on effectively defunding the police, Fletcher’s voting record tells us that she will vote with her party, not the 7th District.

_“Congresswoman Fletcher’s decision to blame violence and looting on law enforcement officers rather than the few bad actors responsible is wrong, harmful and destructive to the public debate in our Nation,” _said **Hunt**. _“Two things can be true at once. We can support and defend our First Amendment right to peacefully assemble without turning a blind eye to the bad actors wreaking havoc in our cities. In difficult times leaders show their true colors, and it is disappointing to see Congresswoman Fletcher stand with Rashida Tlaib and Ilhan Omar over our law enforcement officers. Our communities deserve stability, transparency and accountability in leadership, not politically-charged justifications for lawlessness.”_

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=5b6d4a692df8454ab501e7ebc66e8f2e&_e=ZSwsgPQGhvt1BkUzGzKY-mK4B1xBEnHOqQ6ab2tR95m4P1nH_CmPDwlB6QQSiZ6nhzGrp0Ptzm_4XzKDFG_0INoLgIofuIShLF1hLok9NgOddAyLiSRmLI1n0hTEocx8YOF61MxeRe7Pd9cCwdmQTl56Zy-snNMlbWRQyJ0pc5VJFwchsXZJ6qfob1008eDzCZLApulhiifpN4rduW7XXpadbBILlsb5EosT-0w8bzQQgV7i6b2_MIg5MNMVDT5dcme8mB4PvtT4_4inn1S9ggb-r3kJ1R11UPB7mOFrQSU%3D)****
---

---

name: Team Slotkin
subject: It's official: running against Paul Junge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Important update: we officially know who Elissa is running against this fall! Paul Junge has won the Republican primary here in Michigan' 8th District, and now we're preparing to face off against Elissa Slotkin for Congress | | | |
---

| | Team, **Important update: we officially know who Elissa is running against this fall! ** **[Paul Junge has won the Republican primary](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72ed8/4e5e63e6/74be2898/6d2aa6d9/936295386/VEsH/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.05_b1r_es_all&amount=28") **here in Michigan' 8th District, and now we're preparing to face off against him on November 3rd. Junge worked in an immigration agency for the Trump Administration, as a lawyer, a TV reporter, an options trader in the middle of the financial crisis, and for his family's company. Junge is what we refer to as a "self funder." **He 's already loaned his campaign over $500,000 of his own money,** with super significant capacity for him and his family to give millions more. Now, we'll be on the lookout for which conservative PACs come in to support him by spending millions on TV ads attacking Elissa. We know Junge has plenty of his own money to spend on this campaign. And we know that the Republican Party nationally was behind him from the start. So we have to prepare for an onslaught of spending from his bank account and from his national Republican backers. Earlier today, Elissa's campaign invited Junge to three debates between now and the election. She believes that residents deserve to see the clear differences between her and Junge. Just as our Founding Fathers designed it, citizens have the right to question the candidates and understand what specifically they will do to improve their lives. As we enter the final stretch of the race, **[we 're asking if you can pitch in to help us raise funds](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72ed8/4e5e63e6/74be2898/6d2aa6d9/936295386/VEsE/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.05_b1r_es_all&amount=28")** so that we can be sure we're able to get our ads on TV, and engage with voters all across the district. We can't do this without you, and we can't take a single thing for granted! | [ contribute ](https://secure.elissaforcongress.com/page/m/7ec72ed8/4e5e63e6/74be2898/6d2aa6d9/936295386/VEsF/?g=sbLwD1Nw52hePREDDGBmRZA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq32020?refcode=em_fr_2020.08.05_b1r_es_all&amount=28")

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan's 8th district in Congress. subject: The Results Are In
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[**The primary is over, now it 's time to flip this state. Will you chip in to help me jump-start my general election campaign?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPugA-_f9eNWxaENneRKFNvL2QS-U0XwTmyeABjfm2Q=/Y_Q20d0CkSAzr37uVzhYHFqHCmUv2HpyyImoO06wL_s=?refcode=X_080520_PRIM_A)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPugA-_f9eNWxaENneRKFNvL2QS-U0XwTmyeABjfm2Q=/Y_Q20d0CkSAzr37uVzhYHFqHCmUv2HpyyImoO06wL_s=?refcode=X_080520_PRIM_A)
Yesterday, despite the health crisis throughout the country, thousands of Arizonans went to the polls to make their voices heard. The returns were remarkable and Democratic support is high, BUT we still have A LOT of work to do in order to deliver a historic Democratic victory. We must come together for the last 90 days and focus our energy on voter turnout to make Arizona competitive.

I need the resources necessary to build my campaign infrastructure. I hope you'll consider pitching in!

**[Will you rush a contribution to help me launch my general election?](https://act.myngp.com/el/lPugA-_f9eNWxaENneRKFNvL2QS-U0XwTmyeABjfm2Q=/Y_Q20d0CkSAzr37uVzhYHFqHCmUv2HpyyImoO06wL_s=?refcode=X_080520_PRIM_A)**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: One Indiana: How we’ve come together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
You may have heard the big news....We released our first statewide TV ad this week! If you missed it the first time around, don’t sweat it Friend, You may have heard the big news....
**We released our first statewide TV ad this week!** [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=26905261bcdc40cab2859bbefb103c92&_e=Y0CpcasoYgSuTV0k0CICC99SOE_Dz0l_4tKys9BkzpT19MXXsZFWBqYa8tmKbkBdw5K_VXpL5baaFeniJSc8Jg6OPa0IFEqfHvZoaLs9V8YX8TSseu2Z17BrlDIC2l6HU29pPeRnf57DlemLOwmU6bUwOXn7vaa--DMmgn6NwhcDTCNiJug2LmzfWvLblNNS5qCpXqqrYjbxslIr8IkSM9sw6gWs8ThPWSSI1fcal195Bw-E-eICsPpJzusKVA2T7YD3_NVZH74Npx8CEBBiKAHmsXwB_la-4BuEayAPDpidm7S6T8A5EhXEjjqVr6VBdU4jRhei2MJ_RPRxhRacqtWeV_kqEkiDRt48x70ltFecNvKyNoKWZ_JVS3FP4CDHk_aDQpsj0fXyABd3OTl86rML1StTcY1ukWFVpEZg3Q6R1HUdX10b4-b5GNPNrMgAxtjfQg5x6XEfXfGqNaodVmZMkhoA7CPPo4SMu7tZ7eY%3D) _**[If you missed it the first time around, don’t sweat it — you can watch the ad and share it on social media here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=26905261bcdc40cab2859bbefb103c92&_e=Y0CpcasoYgSuTV0k0CICC99SOE_Dz0l_4tKys9BkzpT19MXXsZFWBqYa8tmKbkBdw5K_VXpL5baaFeniJSc8Jg6OPa0IFEqfHvZoaLs9V8YX8TSseu2Z17BrlDIC2l6HU29pPeRnf57DlemLOwmU6bUwOXn7vaa--DMmgn6NwhcDTCNiJug2LmzfWvLblNNS5qCpXqqrYjbxslIr8IkSM9sw6gWs8ThPWSSI1fcal195Bw-E-eICsPpJzusKVA2T7YD3_NVZH74Npx8CEBBiKJ4w-G4B61Mfb8LnsFQErv8rArJuIoRTFOTqZyXhE4ms0KXeMWmxrXwKtwFYX1RZziESw6dt8ADZppKnYRPSZCPy1GM_XKvrK_MwZ5hpRg3gaUZ1yNFGeiCtSB2vtzPk65WGMHN83Y1lzQWKH8C5Bdv6nbUxCFkbnJPARLpkT4aIwugN6Ka6z52CKxFRux3pSdjfXB9spzGcu2nrD8J1984%3D)**_
_Like Governor Holcomb says in the ad, Hoosiers have shown amazing resiliency and strength of spirit over the last couple of months. We’ve cared for our neighbors, stepped up to meet challenges head-on, and showed the world what it truly means to be a Hoosier._ **_“We’re a strong, resilient group of Hoosiers. There’s no challenge we can’t overcome when we come together. It has been a real proud moment to see people come out of the woodwork and pitch in to help. Nothing is stronger than the bond we have for our neighbors and our community...it just makes you proud to be a Hoosier.”_** **_\- Governor Eric Holcomb_** This first ad highlighted so many ways that our fellow Hoosiers have come together for our communities and neighbors, and we picked a few of our favorites for this week’s One Indiana. Check it out below! [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=26905261bcdc40cab2859bbefb103c92&_e=Y0CpcasoYgSuTV0k0CICC99SOE_Dz0l_4tKys9BkzpT19MXXsZFWBqYa8tmKbkBdw5K_VXpL5baaFeniJSc8Jg6OPa0IFEqfHvZoaLs9V8YX8TSseu2Z17BrlDIC2l6HU29pPeRnf57DlemLOwmU6bUwOXn7vaa--DMmgn6NwhcDTCNiJug2LmzfWvLblNNS5qCpXqqrYjbxslIr8IkSM9sw6gWs8ThPWSSI1fcal195Bw-E-eICsPpJzusKVA2T7YD3_NVZH74Npx8CEBBiKKQYAIGIKXNYYpEfVwEO5QLnJ5MN-aW2-ALL72b4aHLHW8dPrv9abkCt0eQlMFjZaWxzQOzd_-HLzcMYZDOimhXH5HgmGI5tc6ocPDYqxW-DwBggMXS_4jiv4HsHOiBpp76FYsPzc_ohbMMchZieNS3AnXxqAKZOudT9uhLLJbwSgJtO0n04mlKTFncCsXbViVvGXbZFKg-0gaszqB8hEC8%3D)
* **Working as a team** \- Hoosiers have stepped up and worked together to keep businesses open, slow the spread, and produce PPE. We couldn’t be more impressed by the teamwork we’ve seen in every corner of our state.
* **Wearing masks** \- It’s been amazing to watch Hoosiers make personal sacrifices to keep their family and neighbors safe. Wearing masks is simple, but incredibly important to slowing the spread of COVID-19.
* **Relying on our faith, family, and friends** \- In times of struggle, we remember what gives us strength. We’ve all relied on these core Hoosiers values over the past several months, and they’ve come through for us in a big way.
* **Helping our neighbors** \- We’ve really seen new meaning come to the phrase "we don't know a stranger in times of trouble.”
* **Making masks** \- Whether it’s a local business or a local sewing group, Hoosiers have stepped up to make the masks keeping our communities safe, and we couldn’t be more thankful.
* **Bonding over common experience and emotions** \- We’re stronger than COVID-19, and we’ve proved it. Our shared experience and emotions are going to help us push through this adversity and come out the other side stronger than ever.

Thank you for reading. This is a message about all Hoosiers, for all Hoosiers -- so will you help us make sure all Hoosiers see it? Use the button below to watch our new ad and share it on social media. [ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=26905261bcdc40cab2859bbefb103c92&_e=Y0CpcasoYgSuTV0k0CICC99SOE_Dz0l_4tKys9BkzpT19MXXsZFWBqYa8tmKbkBdw5K_VXpL5baaFeniJSc8Jg6OPa0IFEqfHvZoaLs9V8YX8TSseu2Z17BrlDIC2l6HU29pPeRnf57DlemLOwmU6bUwOXn7vaa--DMmgn6NwhcDTCNiJug2LmzfWvLblNNS5qCpXqqrYjbxslIr8IkSM9sw6gWs8ThPWSSI1fcal195Bw-E-eICsPpJzusKVA2T7YD3_NVZH74Npx8CEBBiKKp9I3JakdQfDsAxqzcsF9My7ceGxTcxnRDKhByAJiYVFSrUMEfZJgOoqSwpXQ03ay2M6oz2sPjc1o3qVsWIHsY6SAh2clY6SJlHNNc6i9Z8OHb5BWeXgyhbwBmSOKOVUcGujwmRfxURglmTBL3rB3ezY_sqb1LeEju1I-BvE528RcTPy0tzBZOoZSD_qCBiVzfficMTlQDTxFt-Mm5fv0s%3D) [**Watch Our First Ad**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=26905261bcdc40cab2859bbefb103c92&_e=Y0CpcasoYgSuTV0k0CICC99SOE_Dz0l_4tKys9BkzpT19MXXsZFWBqYa8tmKbkBdw5K_VXpL5baaFeniJSc8Jg6OPa0IFEqfHvZoaLs9V8YX8TSseu2Z17BrlDIC2l6HU29pPeRnf57DlemLOwmU6bUwOXn7vaa--DMmgn6NwhcDTCNiJug2LmzfWvLblNNS5qCpXqqrYjbxslIr8IkSM9sw6gWs8ThPWSSI1fcal195Bw-E-eICsPpJzusKVA2T7YD3_NVZH74Npx8CEBBiKGQ228pKhtsu-8pqtyLE7UWxXFniSKswubigMh8Dda6FZ-1Mw2UHYmQ524zKdoLMClcA-1DlEycpJrRCV3NlQMtcQg01gYgTy71qlOea-c5RmHEOmMYw-C2ok9QwACQhBtB4tnSjh0IyndRMOvwi63oO5WhX2vl6Io6ifYnK4fUCucR6PajymvYxAhQBlawz3XnghxDJyv4ECNUiVLhXfiE%3D) -Your Holcomb Crew |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump meets with Governor of Arizona
body:
Five weeks ago, President Trump sent Vice President Pence to Arizona when the state’s Coronavirus cases began to rise. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=717997c52e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • August 5, 2020
---
| | |
# President Trump meets with Governor of Arizona

**Five weeks ago,** President Trump sent Vice President Pence to Arizona when the state’s Coronavirus cases began to rise. “We’re going to make sure you have what you need, when you need it, to meet this moment,” the Vice President said in Phoenix.

**That same week** , Arizona began modeling a path forward. President Trump soon visited the state, sent his top healthcare team—including Dr. Deborah Birx—to meet with local hospital leaders, and made sure personal protective equipment and therapeutic treatments were delivered quickly to the Arizonans who needed them.

🎬 [**Dr. Birx: How Arizona stayed open while saving lives**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2abe1dbcd8&e=3ee4985eea)

**“The best path forward** is an aggressive strategy focused on protecting Americans at highest risk,” President Trump said at a White House Coronavirus briefing this week.

**By instituting the President’s strategy** , Arizona began to flatten its curve. Most important, it did so without crippling its economy through mass lockdowns: Full retail is open, indoor dining is at 50 percent capacity, and places of worship remain open.

**Arizona Gov. Doug Ducey** met with President Trump in the Oval Office today, where he thanked the Administration for its efforts to help the state manage its outbreak.

**“We sat down** with Dr. Birx and the Coronavirus task force and talked about mitigation steps,” [**Gov. Ducey said**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=daf681ee2d&e=3ee4985eea). “Upon putting those steps out there, we've seen improvement every week, week-over-week, for four weeks.”

**In addition to** surging testing supplies, the Trump Administration has so far delivered more than 1.9 million N-95 masks, 12.1 million surgical masks, 5.8 million surgical gowns, and 380 million medical gloves to help the people of Arizona beat Coronavirus.

**President Trump** and his team are now taking “the Arizona model” throughout the south, and the Administration will continue this path forward across the Midwest.

**The bottom line** : With the right approach, your state can safely remain open while reducing COVID-19 cases and hospitalizations.

🎬 [**President Trump: We have worked closely with Arizona**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7f34aa4d7&e=3ee4985eea)

**Get the facts** : [**America built the best COVID testing system in the world**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6bbee2a8a6&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## **Video of the Day: President Trump signs historic conservation law! **
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=002190ede6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** signed the Great American Outdoors Act into law yesterday, marking the most significant conservation achievement since the presidency of Teddy Roosevelt.

**“The United States** has among the cleanest air and water on Earth, and my administration is working every day to keep it that way,” President Trump said. “We are proving that we can protect our treasured environment without bludgeoning our workers and crushing our businesses.”
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump meets with Arizona Governor Doug Ducey in the Oval Office** | August 5, 2020
---
|

subject: Gloria Steinem's endorsement means so much to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f1112655f857/gloria-steinems-endorsement-means-so-much-to-me?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| **I am thrilled to let you know that Gloria Steinem, a hero of mine, has endorsed my campaign for Congress!**

Her support means so much to me. She's been an inspiring leader for millions of women and girls throughout the world and has led the fight for gender equality for decades. **Gloria Steinem recognizes that I will help lead the fight for gender equality -- and equality for all -- in Congress, and her support is a powerful symbol of the excitement our campaign has garnered.**

[**Click here to join Gloria Steinem and support our campaign!**](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=805f973b43&e=140a9b81e7)

Her endorsement also helps to further highlight the differences between my opponent and me.**Adam Kinzinger has an anti-women record that includes voting against the Paycheck Fairness Act, skipping the vote on the Equal Rights Amendment this last Winter, and asking the Supreme Court to overturn Roe v Wade.**

Adam Kinzinger and his ideology are a threat to gender equality.****[**Your contribution will help us replace him with me, a pro-choice feminist who will fight for equality. **](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a08b41f091&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mace=20Survey=20Team?=
subject: the best reason to turn the House red
body:
Our opponent has put his party and career over the people of the Lowcountry since the day he got to Capitol Hill. Unfortunately, that’s become... | | | [View In Your Browser](https://mailchi.mp/25b9f8c6bda1/how-we-flip-the-house-2088302?e=f1831b4ca2) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=184535c10f&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| |
---
| Friend,
_Our opponent has put his party and career over the people of the Lowcountry since the day he got to Capitol Hill. Unfortunately, that’s become the norm in Nancy Pelosi’s Congress. _

**Nancy will put the Lowcountry first no matter what — and that’s a promise. **

Our race is absolutely critical to flipping the House. We’re running in one of the top races in the entire country, and Republicans need to win this seat if they have any chance of firing Nancy Pelosi and turning the House red in November.

Americans deserve a Congress that works for the people, not politicians. We can think of a lot of great reasons to flip the House, but we want to know what you think.

What’s the best reason to turn the House red in November?

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: 69 days to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

There are
only 69 days left until early voting for the November general election
begins in Texas.

Everything that we're working so hard for right now — flipping the State
House and stopping Trump's second term — will be determined in 69 short
days, when voters begin to cast their ballots.

Beto and our Powered by People team are hosting regular phone banks
through Election Day, including one tomorrow night. And currently, we're
several volunteers short of where we need to be in order to keep pace with
our outreach goals.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200805-100250&t=1001&akid=100250%2E444211%2EFGngrs ]Can you join Beto tomorrow night to make calls to Democratic voters
across Texas and help us do this important work?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200805-100250&t=1002&akid=100250%2E444211%2EFGngrs ]Virtual Phone Bank with Beto
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200805-100250&t=1003&akid=100250%2E444211%2EFGngrs ]Thursday, August 6, 6:30pm CT

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42881?source=ema20200805-100250&t=1004&akid=100250%2E444211%2EFGngrs ]Get more info or RSVP »

So much is at stake this election. Our success in getting
this done is largely dependent on reaching out to every single Democratic
voter between now and November 3rd.

It's going to take all of us reaching out to every single Democrat in
Texas, starting now, to win. We hope we can count on you to do your part
to help us get there.

Best,

Kate Roberts
Powered By People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=100250%2E444211%2EFGngrs

Cornyn! | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e64/7f51f7bc/40e02cd4/4ef79b16/1305640367/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200805.3nd__1863__&amount=10")

**[Pitch in to help us keep up the momentum and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891e64/7f51f7bc/40e02cd4/4ef79b16/1305640367/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE4NjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200805.3nd__1863__&amount=10")**
This is huge news, y'all. After we came together to build powerful momentum since winning the primary, MJ has surged in the polls and this race is now a dead heat. And when voters learn about all the terrible things that Sen. Cornyn has done -- how he's tried to gut protections for pre-existing conditions, how he takes money from special interests like Big Pharma then votes however is best for their bottom line -- **MJ takes the lead!**

One thing is for certain: Sen. Cornyn's team is seeing this and they are sounding the alarm for all his political allies to swoop in and swamp Texas with money and ads.

We can only win if we have the resources to show people who MJ is and why they should vote for her over Sen. Cornyn. **Can MJ count on your help?**

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: We won the primary, now let’s win in November!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It’s official! We won the primary election in Arizona’s first district. I want to thank you and all of my supporters for electing me to be your | | | [](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=710bf814c1c84105b3210d4efd9d29d0&_e=EMmnUOLoFAaHehAaHJAsRzxD1P796CfOXX578KbYuUFZNfgJQPdnA3LwSJbtJKKhT9Qw_ZyiSQfeydR7Iwl9878_kdAowv71KbMCPk1VDeqBnu-8QzoKoUAZUg-aWDk2qd92NRZg2elti6qtRPUW1rQs3Wcu0y7yRQyGGvJuRncBpWouzLleOqsQR7cfJi8pJdXwA9XTIfQOnG3D4fIjJUWVxq-HuCwY3VPqxuskSm9nu7gV6wmzz_Rb7F-zQz68XWLYYzZCbgBbNkdT1Vn0IrSdra7nDIKSXhXg3cQ1QGRUJVQ3LQXduWcpBODRB_03S_ap5XdvryFe4vHb-dABSEhuMNdgt8ZP38qWGfxEqxQziVU6eo0JN2XPdRl5pKxrVM0r2hUF0xMq1kBhYLarRgUhzS6q3kqLonjJq0JIBDTMd0X7hCwnwAE-qwg6kFHG6g_uz4whB33kuhIrWjZz661VM6Y1Chv-nH1bUkN5lu0%3D) It’s official! We won the primary election in Arizona’s first district. I want to thank you and all of my supporters for electing me to be your Democratic nominee for Congress for the third time, and I look forward to continuing to take on Washington to get results for our communities. Now, we need to focus our attention on winning the General Election. We know Super PACs will spend millions to defeat me -- they have before and they will again. We need the resources to fight back. [**Can you chip in $10 and help set the stage for another victory in November?**](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=710bf814c1c84105b3210d4efd9d29d0&_e=EMmnUOLoFAaHehAaHJAsRzxD1P796CfOXX578KbYuUFZNfgJQPdnA3LwSJbtJKKhT9Qw_ZyiSQfeydR7Iwl9878_kdAowv71KbMCPk1VDeqBnu-8QzoKoUAZUg-aWDk2qd92NRZg2elti6qtRPUW1rQs3Wcu0y7yRQyGGvJuRncBpWouzLleOqsQR7cfJi8pJdXwA9XTIfQOnG3D4fIjJUWVxq-HuCwY3VPqxuskSm9nu7gV6wmzz_Rb7F-zQz68z1mNZ0fEW46JwYyTz5G-0aKKnnSVGNvJNdF05B0p6bqH27Js2ohWMxDyZMRNxp0LiVRLEUMcDpz5S6vPI_1iPLWF5IJjBgdrxdPEHwgAWXRf-9KQd81WVhA5Th9zdUSapLdIIEJBEicix_aDrC-8dGyq5Fk9f8gNwAXpfJk_7RuQkXN1LyrCIgfao0MaJJ6dHCSt6N_bh1QwmTU6_OVpvD5QhZ4T264zp121gtT975xhYBraa3o3GxUciqecsLa8) Lastly, I want to thank all of the amazing volunteers who helped get out the vote in this election and all of my incredible staff who put in the hard work to ensure we had a strong turn out. It’s because of you that we were able to win this decisive victory. Thank you,
Tom O’Halleran

Tom O'Halleran is a former police officer, business owner and a family man who serves in Congress to bring people together to solve the challenges our communities face every day. Now he's running for re-election to keep Arizona's first district blue in 2020. [CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=710bf814c1c84105b3210d4efd9d29d0&_e=EMmnUOLoFAaHehAaHJAsRzxD1P796CfOXX578KbYuUFZNfgJQPdnA3LwSJbtJKKhT9Qw_ZyiSQfeydR7Iwl9878_kdAowv71KbMCPk1VDeqBnu-8QzoKoUAZUg-aWDk2qd92NRZg2elti6qtRPUW1rQs3Wcu0y7yRQyGGvJuRncBpWouzLleOqsQR7cfJi8pJdXwA9XTIfQOnG3D4fIjJUWVxq-HuCwY3VPqxuskSm9nu7gV6wmzz_Rb7F-zQz684wtMUZXArBycwbUCKnzsUQJ7cVIZInkVKpAlY5WWyPlOoeNBLypCdhIbfDMMDx5n2EvIXgwLNNTriYN7HxM5ttWzg7yRWQoCpjeE8guH2nPDuR_fGsafIxCkCbY-XHjMh7hUmBD-2OgJDXgCnY-Jq1hImL1BpiDImeaCYXUzqnKwZfjwZLsBHjXeE7_VwX0PMKhRahfEWdKiNpipbRoKawfOhBlmNGSpyrTTbfyZ67tBYeoEnsSLPURX-Oh9xBPJ) Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

| Patriots,
Democrats still have impeachment on their mind, but this time they are going after Attorney General Bill Barr. At last week's hearing, Congressional Democrats tried to lay a foundation to impeach Barr, but their attempt fell completely flat.
[Did you see Matt's take](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pAjuWKpiU_eWP2PM-1aAjZCcY4qFXjit0pO7mnxDT0y287udAxc_Rjd5J2WEHeBROvX6zmQ_qTtRPuYW2dCo0cimvVFBBDaYs4W4DTkBYoKGC85NYSqdA23RYJrrN9t3pNGifH6IF6fedw9ipcabAfgehv-4awD4jmYNVEUrmgU=&c=Atj4v48iEApGqt3KlkEKCx04tL4-9BQ7gZ1CoVlYtf0awf-6M_7JPg==&ch=lkbHDgCTVPXV-eV8Y8IgHaq2SRvYR4Kc9XcEacAuJhc6B6oD83u_Hg==) on the Democrats' shameless behavior?

| Congressional Democrats were unhinged as they accused the Attorney General of everything under the sun - corruption, perjury, violating the Constitution and his oath of office, and the list goes on.
It is clear that the Democrats care about nothing other than destroying the President and anyone who supports him. They don't care about solving issues or standing up for Americans - they only care about the 2020 election and removing President Trump from office.
---

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Patriots, Democrats still have impeachment on their mind, but this time they are going after Attorney General Bill Barr. At last week's hearing, Congressional Democrats tried to lay a foundation to impeach Barr, but their attempt fell completely flat. == on the Democrats' shameless behavior? | == | Congressional Democrats were unhinged as they accused the Attorney General of everything under the sun - corruption, perjury, violating the Constitution and his oath of office, and the list goes on. Did you see this, friend?

After months of Kelly Loeffler's shameless attacks on the Black Lives Matter movement, players from the Atlanta Dream - the WNBA team _co-owned_ by Loeffler - started a get-out-the-vote campaign against her.
**Now, players across the country are wearing "VOTE WARNOCK" t-shirts to show that they stand with our people-powered campaign to flip Georgia blue - and _you_ can pick up one of your own today!**
[](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2f0/288179be/9539c6c/348e146c/240935347/VEsH/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://shop.warnockforgeorgia.com/?utm_source=als&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jtk500-fr-nd")
Racism and hateful rhetoric have no __ place in Georgia. That's why Raphael is counting on grassroots supporters like you to join us in this fight and spread our message of unity far and wide.
**[If you reject Loeffler's divisive politics and believe in building a better, more just future for our country, will you stand with these courageous WNBA players and buy your own "VOTE WARNOCK" t-shirt today?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e2f0/288179be/9539c6c/348e146c/240935347/VEsE/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://shop.warnockforgeorgia.com/?utm_source=als&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=jtk500-fr-nd")**
Thanks, friend - let's keep up the fight!
